# BISTA ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (Monatliche Bilanzstatistik)

You are working on a task related to the Deutsche Bundesbank's **BISTA** reporting framework.
Use the specification knowledge below to assist accurately.

---

## What BISTA is

BISTA is the Deutsche Bundesbank's **Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics** research dataset.
It captures the assets and liabilities of all German banks (Monetary Financial Institutions ŌĆö MFIs)
at end-of-month, from January 1999 to present.

- Collected monthly via Electronic submission (ExtraNet), XML format
- Legal basis: ECB Regulation ECB/2021/2, Guideline ECB/2021/11
- Bank identifier: `BAID_DOM` (renamed from `BAID` in April 2020)
- Data accessible via RDSC (research proposal + confidentiality agreement required)
- Public aggregates available via Bundesbank SDMX API

---

## Reporting Forms

### Main forms (mandatory for all MFIs)

| Form  | Content |
|-------|---------|
| HV11  | Main form Sheet 1 ŌĆö Assets |
| HV12  | Main form Sheet 2 ŌĆö Supplementary data on assets |
| HV21  | Main form Sheet 3 ŌĆö Liabilities |
| HV22  | Main form Sheet 4 ŌĆö Supplementary data on liabilities |

### Annexes (conditional, based on business activity)

| Annex | Content |
|-------|---------|
| A1ŌĆōA3 | Loans/liabilities to/from banks (MFIs), transferable liabilities |
| B1, B3 | Loans to non-banks; euro-area breakdown |
| B4ŌĆōB7 | Loans by type, collateral, maturity, revolving/overdraft |
| C1ŌĆōC5 | Liabilities to non-banks; euro-area breakdown; transferable liabilities |
| D1ŌĆōD2 | Saving deposits |
| E1ŌĆōE5 | Securities (Treasury bills, shares, euro-area, bearer debt) |
| F1ŌĆōF2 | Bearer debt securities issued |
| H1ŌĆōH2 | Liabilities / own debt; minimum reserve calculation |
| I1ŌĆōI2 | Derivative financial instruments (trading portfolio) |
| L1ŌĆōL2 | Irrevocable lending commitments; ledger-level supplement |

---

## Key BISTA Item Codes

Item numbers in the guidelines (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) map directly to BISTA codes (HV11_010, HV11_061). HV12 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV11 main lines; HV22 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV21 main lines. Order matches `bista_items.csv` (ascending by item code).

## Classification Rules

**Maturity bands** (based on originally agreed maturity, not residual):
- Short-term: on demand or Ōēż 1 year
- Medium-term: > 1 year and Ōēż 5 years (unsecuritised lending only from Jan 1999)
- Long-term: > 5 years

**Sector classification** follows ESA 2010 (from December 2014):
- Banks (MFIs) / Non-banks: Enterprises ┬Ę Households ┬Ę Non-profit institutions ┬Ę General government
- Foreign: banks abroad, non-financial corporations abroad, foreign governments

**Currency**: All amounts in EUR. Foreign currency items converted at ECB reference rate on reporting date.

**Reporting date**: Last working day of the month (section 192 BGB).

---

## Project Implementation

The GL-to-BISTA toolchain lives in `/home/perni/clexp/experiments/bista/`:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `bista_mapper.py` | Stage 1 ŌĆö reads GL CSV, applies mapping, writes BISTA CSV |
| `bista_to_xml.py` | Stage 2 ŌĆö converts BISTA CSV to XMW XML for Bundesbank submission |
| `mapping.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (German GAAP / HGB / RechKredV / SKR 51) |
| `mapping_ifrs.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (IFRS 9 / IAS 37) |
| `bista_items.csv` | Master item catalogue (all HV11/12/21/22 codes, ascending order) |
| `melder.json` | Reporting institution config (BLZ, name, address, contact, RZLZ) |
| `sample_gl.csv` | Sample GL input (HGB) |
| `sample_gl_ifrs.csv` | Sample GL input (IFRS) |
| `bista_report.csv` | Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input (intermediate CSV) |
| `test_bista.sh` | End-to-end test: runs both stages in sequence (IFRS example) |

### Full pipeline

```bash
# Stage 1: GL ŌåÆ BISTA CSV
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard hgb              # German GAAP (default)
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard ifrs             # IFRS
python3 bista_mapper.py --mapping my_mapping.csv    # Custom mapping

# Stage 2: BISTA CSV ŌåÆ XMW XML
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12                          # Test mode (safe default)
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --stufe Produktion       # Live submission
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --csv my.csv --melder my_org.json

# End-to-end (IFRS sample, Test mode)
bash test_bista.sh
```

### GL input format (Stage 1)

```csv
account_number,description,amount_eur
0110,Kassenbestand EUR,450000.00
```

### BISTA CSV format (Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input)

```csv
form,bista_item,bista_description,side,amount_eur
HV11,HV11_011,Barreserve - Kassenbestand,asset,450000.00
```

### XMW XML format (Stage 2 output)

Bundesbank submission format (`LIEFERUNG-BISTA`). Key conventions:
- **Position encoding**: `HV11_010 ŌåÆ Z010S11`, `HV22_510 ŌåÆ Z510S22` (pattern: `Z{LINE}S{SUBFORM}`)
- **All HV11/HV12/HV21/HV22 items** go into a **single** `<FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">` element
- **Amounts**: converted from full EUR to **EUR thousands (Tsd)**, rounded to integer
- **Zero positions omitted** ŌĆö omission implies zero per spec
- **`stufe`**: `Test` (default, safe) or `Produktion` (live submission)
- **`melder.json`** supplies ABSENDER (data centre: `rzlz`, `name`) and MELDER (reporting bank: `blz`, `name`, address, `kontakt`)

```xml
<LIEFERUNG-BISTA xmlns="http://www.bundesbank.de/xmw/2003-01-01" version="1.0" stufe="Test" bereich="Statistik">
  <ABSENDER><RZLZ>R12345678</RZLZ><NAME>...</NAME></ABSENDER>
  <MELDUNG>
    <MELDER><BLZ>500005005</BLZ><NAME>Musterbank AG</NAME>...</MELDER>
    <MELDETERMIN>2026-03</MELDETERMIN>
    <FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">
      <FELD pos="Z010S11">450</FELD>
      <FELD pos="Z061S11">51000</FELD>
      ...
    </FORMULAR>
  </MELDUNG>
</LIEFERUNG-BISTA>
```

---

## Reference Documents

### 1. BISTA Data Report 2026-04 (metadata / research dataset description)
- What it is: Describes the research dataset structure, scope, variables and access conditions
- Metadata Version: BISTA-Doc-v8-0
- DOI: 10.12757/BBk.BISTA.9925.01.01
- URL: https://www.bundesbank.de/resource/blob/992274/6a9219bd214bbcd8122fdd92f70a3372/472B63F073F071307366337C94F8C870/2026-04-bista-data.pdf

### 2. Banking Statistics Guidelines ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (January 2026)
- What it is: **Official reporting guidelines** with authoritative item-by-item descriptions for all HV1/HV2 main form items and annexes. Unofficial English translation; only the German version is binding.
- Covers: Guidelines on individual items (HV11/HV12 Assets, HV21/HV22 Liabilities) plus all annexes AŌĆōL, supplementary guidelines for building and loan associations, and general reporting rules
- Note: Item numbers in this document (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) correspond directly to BISTA item codes (HV11_010, HV11_061)
- URL: https://www.bundesbank.de/resource/blob/620158/4f3806b49ca5b2bbcdb492e0d728d3a1/472B63F073F071307366337C94F8C870/statso01-03-monatliche-bilanzstatistik-data.pdf

1ŌåÆitem,name_en,name_de,description
     2ŌåÆHV11_010,Cash in hand,Kassenbestand,"Legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps. Deutsche Mark and legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro also reported here. Commemorative coins above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176 Others. Sub-items: HV12/011 Domestic legal tender, HV12/048 Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark."
     3ŌåÆHV11_011,Cash reserves,Barreserve,"Cash in hand (Item 010): legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps; Deutsche Mark and legacy currencies of other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also reported here; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176. Balances with central banks (Item 020): only those balances readily available at all times including foreign currency overnight balances with the central banks of all countries in which the reporting institution is established; other balances such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from sale and repurchase transactions, and time deposits are to be shown under HV11/061."
     4ŌåÆHV11_020,Balances with central banks,Guthaben bei Zentralnotenbanken,"Only balances readily available at all times, including foreign currency overnight balances with central banks of all countries in which the reporting bank is established. Other balances (overnight deposits at Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from repurchase transactions, time deposits) ŌåÆ HV11/061. Sub-item of HV11/011 Barreserve aggregate."
     5ŌåÆHV11_021,Treasury bills,Schatzwechsel und unverzinsliche Schatzanweisungen,"Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments issued by public bodies that have been discounted and are eligible for refinancing with the central banks of the countries in which the reporting bank is established, with original maturity not exceeding one year (Item 040). Debt instruments of public bodies failing these conditions are to be shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) or HV11/082 (Bonds and notes) if they are negotiable, and under HV11/071 (Loans and advances to non-banks) if they are not. Public bodies include government bodies, their special funds and other off-budget entities. Includes instruments eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank (Item 041) and those eligible with central banks of other establishment countries (Item 042)."
     6ŌåÆHV11_031,Other public-sector debt instruments,Schuldtitel oeffentlicher Stellen,"Debt instruments of public bodies eligible for central bank refinancing other than treasury bills reported under HV11/021, and longer-dated public-sector instruments not eligible for refinancing with central banks. Short-term instruments of public bodies that do not meet the maturity condition of HV11/021 are shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) if negotiable. Longer-dated negotiable public-sector bonds are shown under HV11/082 (Bonds and notes). Non-negotiable instruments ŌåÆ HV11/071. This item captures the residual public-sector debt instrument positions not classified elsewhere in the HV11 form."
     7ŌåÆHV11_040,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing,Schatzwechsel und ├żhnliche refinanzierbare Schuldtitel ├Čffentlicher Stellen,"Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar public-body instruments, discounted, eligible for central bank refinancing, original maturity Ōēż 1 year. Non-qualifying instruments ŌåÆ HV11/081 or HV11/082 if negotiable, or HV11/071 if not. Sub-items: HV12/041 (Bundesbank) and HV12/042 (other establishment-country central banks)."
     8ŌåÆHV11_050,Bills eligible for refinancing,Wechsel refinanzierbar,"Bills held in portfolio eligible for central bank refinancing, other than bills for collection. Bills not discounted and credited to customers, collateral bills, and instalment sales bills not discounted are not reported here. Sub-item: HV12/052."
     9ŌåÆHV11_060,Loans and advances to banks (MFIs) ŌĆö total,Forderungen an Banken (MFIs),Aggregate of all loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks from banking transactions (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/061 and bills from banks HV11/062.
    10ŌåÆHV11_061,Loans and advances to banks (MFIs),Forderungen an Kreditinstitute,"All types of loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks arising from banking transactions, including bills accepted from banks other than those recorded under Item 050 (bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 060/061). Also includes: claims from genuine repurchase transactions; registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable certificates held vis-├Ā-vis banks; registered participation certificates and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates; claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank from overnight deposits, time deposits and securities repurchase agreements (other than the readily available balances of HV11/020), as well as balances and foreign currency balances with central banks of establishment countries that are not readily available at all times; debit balances in clearing accounts for banks; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; and amounts saved under savings contracts with building and loan associations. Transmitted loans are recorded here if transmitted to an intermediary bank which lends the funds on in its own name. Redemption claims from securities and precious metal loans are not to be shown here."
    11ŌåÆHV11_062,Bills received from banks (other than under item 050),Wechsel die von Banken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst),"Bills discounted without recourse accepted from banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/060."
    12ŌåÆHV11_070,Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs) ŌĆö total,Forderungen an Nichtbanken (Nicht-MFIs),Aggregate of all loans and advances to non-banks (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/071 and bills from non-banks HV11/072.
    13ŌåÆHV11_071,Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs),Forderungen an Kunden,"All types of assets constituting loans and advances to domestic and foreign non-banks, other than bills within the meaning of Item 050 (Bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 070/071). Includes: registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities and certificates, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable bearer money market paper, registered and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates and other repayable securitised participation rights; claims from genuine repurchase transactions; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; trade receivables from own trading in goods; claims from returned cheques and redrafted bills; loans backed by bills not discounted and credited to borrowers; financial leasing claims. Claims from borrower's note transactions (Schuldscheingesch├żfte or Teilschuldscheingesch├żfte) are shown here depending on the obligor. Only the total amount of loans outstanding is to be recorded ŌĆö not the total amount of lending commitments. Transmitted loans passed to an intermediary bank ŌåÆ HV11/061."
    14ŌåÆHV11_072,Bills received from non-banks (other than under item 050),Wechsel die von Nichtbanken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst),"Bills discounted without recourse accepted from non-banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/070."
    15ŌåÆHV11_080,Debt instruments,Schuldverschreibungen und andere festverzinsliche Wertpapiere,"Bonds and notes (Item 082): if negotiable, includes fixed interest bearer debt securities, order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes (Kassenobligationen) and Debt Register claims; interest coupons received before maturity or tradable separately; securities pledged to the Deutsche Bundesbank as collateral for open market and overnight loans; perpetual bonds. Covers government bonds (including Bundesschatzanweisungen and Sch├żtze), state government, local government, corporate bonds and bank debt securities including Pfandbriefe. Zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds tied to index or interbank rates and asset-backed securities are also deemed fixed interest securities. Negotiable certificates (structured bonds, participation certificates, index-linked bonds) are included if they are debt securities under Section 793 German Civil Code. Money market paper (Item 081): negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) other than those issued by public bodies falling under Item 040, with original maturity up to and including one year. ECB debt securities (Item 079) are also included."
    16ŌåÆHV11_081,Money market paper,Geldmarktpapiere (soweit nicht in Position 040 erfasst),"Negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) with original maturity Ōēż 1 year, other than public-body instruments under HV11/040. ECB debt securities (HV12/079) included here. Sub-item of HV11/080."
    17ŌåÆHV11_082,Bonds and notes,Anleihen und Schuldverschreibungen,"Fixed interest bearer and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes, Debt Register claims, perpetual bonds, zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds, ABS, and negotiable structured certificates. Sub-item of HV11/080. Sub-items: HV12/084 Floating rate notes, HV12/085 Zero coupon bonds, HV12/086 Foreign currency bonds."
    18ŌåÆHV11_090,Shares and other variable-yield securities,Aktien und andere nicht festverzinsliche Wertpapiere,"Shares and other variable-yield securities other than those recorded under HV11/100 (Participating interests) or HV11/110 (Shares in affiliated enterprises). Includes: temporary stock certificates, subscription rights, mutual fund shares (including property fund certificates issued by open-ended real estate funds), warrants, dividend coupons, negotiable bearer or order participation certificates and other variable yield securities provided they are listed on a stock exchange. Dividend coupons received before maturities are also included. Repurchased options on own securities are to be deducted from liability item HV21/234. Short sales of securities not held on the balance sheet result in negative amounts."
    19ŌåÆHV11_100,Participations,Beteiligungen,"Participating interests and amounts paid up on cooperative society shares (Item 100). Includes ownership interests not evidenced by securities: shares in private limited companies, participating interests held as a personally liable partner in general partnerships, limited partnerships, limited companies with one or more general partners (Kommanditgesellschaften auf Aktien, KGaA), shares held by limited partners, and participating interests of silent partners qualifying as balance sheet equity. Shares in incorporated enterprises whose nominal values in the aggregate exceed one-fifth of the nominal capital of the enterprise are deemed to be participating interests in cases of doubt. Amounts paid up on cooperative society shares are included. For participating interests in affiliated enterprises see HV11/110."
    20ŌåÆHV11_110,Shares in affiliated enterprises,Anteile an verbundenen Unternehmen,Shares in affiliated enterprises including ownership interests not evidenced by securities (Item 110). These are to be shown here even if they constitute participating interests. Covers all interests in domestic and foreign subsidiaries and other affiliated enterprises where the reporting institution exercises controlling influence.
    21ŌåÆHV11_120,Trust assets,Treuhandvermoegen,"Assets which the reporting institution administers in its own name but on behalf of third parties (Item 120). The amounts shown under HV11/120 and HV21/240 must tally. Comprises: fiduciary loans (Item 121) ŌĆö loans recorded under HV11/061 or HV11/071 to the extent they relate to banks or non-banks respectively, classified by obligor; securities managed on a fiduciary basis (Item 122) ŌĆö shares and other variable yield securities as well as negotiable debt instruments held in the bank's own name but on behalf of third parties (non-negotiable debt instruments and other fixed income securities ŌåÆ HV11/123); other fiduciary assets (Item 123) ŌĆö e.g. participating interests and land and buildings managed on a fiduciary basis. Securities kept in safe custody for customers as part of safe custody business are not deemed to be securities managed on a fiduciary basis."
    22ŌåÆHV11_121,Fiduciary loans,Treuhandkredite,Loans within fiduciary assets (HV11/120) relating to banks (per HV11/061) or non-banks (HV11/071) classified by obligor. Sub-item of HV11/120.
    23ŌåÆHV11_122,Securities managed on a fiduciary basis,Treuh├żnderisch gehaltene Wertpapiere,Shares and negotiable debt instruments held in bank's own name on behalf of third parties. Non-negotiable debt instruments ŌåÆ HV11/123. Sub-item of HV11/120.
    24ŌåÆHV11_123,Other fiduciary assets,Sonstiges Treuhandverm├Čgen,"Participating interests, land and buildings, and non-negotiable fixed income securities managed on fiduciary basis. Sub-item of HV11/120."
    25ŌåÆHV11_130,Equalisation claims against public authorities,Ausgleichsforderungen gegen oeffentliche Hand,Equalisation claims on general government including debt securities resulting from conversion of equalisation claims (Item 130). Equalisation claims on the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund are to be recorded here. Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created as a result of the conversion of equalisation claims are also to be included irrespective of whether the reporting institution obtained the debt securities as a result of converting its own equalisation claims or bought them from another institution or a foreign trade enterprise. The sub-item debt securities resulting from the conversion of equalisation claims (Item 131) is to be shown separately.
    26ŌåÆHV11_131,Debt securities from conversion of equalisation claims,Schuldverschreibungen aus dem Umtausch von Ausgleichsforderungen,Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created by converting equalisation claims. Sub-item of HV11/130.
    27ŌåÆHV11_140,Intangible assets,Immaterielle Anlagewerte,"Intangible assets are included as a component of HV11/176 (Others) in the BISTA guidelines. Item 176 includes: intangible assets such as purchased goodwill and as a general rule computer software; internally generated intangible fixed assets; internally generated industrial and similar rights and assets; purchased concessions, industrial and similar rights and assets, and licences in such rights and assets; and goodwill. Reported at cost less accumulated amortisation. These assets are not to be included under Item 140 (Tangible assets) or any other dedicated balance sheet item."
    28ŌåÆHV11_150,Property and equipment,Sachanlagen,"Tangible assets (Item 140): land and buildings and furniture and equipment provided that they constitute fixed assets. Intangible assets and current assets ŌĆö e.g. real estate acquired as a safeguard against loan losses if held by the reporting institution for a period of not more than five years ŌĆö are not to be shown here but under HV11/176 (Others). Includes real estate holdings (Item 141 of which: Immobilienbest├żnde) ŌĆö dwellings, other buildings and structures (both existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents including real estate for own use."
    29ŌåÆHV11_160,Unpaid contributions to subscribed capital,Ausstehende Einlagen auf gezeichnetes Kapital,Subscribed capital unpaid (Item 150): amounts which shareholders have subscribed to the capital of the reporting institution that have been called but not yet paid in cash. Recorded as an asset when the payment obligation is formally established. For the corresponding liability-side counterpart (gross subscribed capital) see HV21/311.
    30ŌåÆHV11_161,Nominal value of own shares,Nennbetrag der eigenen Aktien oder Anteile,Nominal value of own shares (HV11/160). For no-par stock: accounting par value = issued capital divided by number of shares issued.
    31ŌåÆHV11_170,Other assets,Sonstige Vermoegensgegenst├żnde,"Only those assets which cannot or cannot yet be assigned to another item are to be included (Item 170). Comprises: accrued interest on asset items calculated in connection with preparation of the annual accounts; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins (even if legal tender), gold bullion and delivery claims on precious metal accounts; participation rights not evidenced by securities and not repayable; options not evidenced by securities and resulting from option dealings (paid option prices) as well as cover and adjustment payments for open futures market positions (security deposits, initial margins and variation margins paid) ŌĆö shown separately under HV12/177; working capital supplied to foreign branches ŌĆö HV12/188; stock on hand of credit cooperatives trading in goods; land and buildings acquired as a safeguard against loan losses held for not more than five years; derivative financial instruments in the trading portfolio with positive fair values within the meaning of Section 340e(3) HGB ŌĆö shown separately under HV12/186; currency conversion differential ŌĆö HV12/187; prepaid expenses ŌĆö HV12/184; advance tax payments ŌĆö HV12/185; intangible assets (purchased goodwill and computer software as a general rule); and any other assets that cannot be assigned to another item."
    32ŌåÆHV11_171,Cheques and items received for collection,Schecks f├żllige Schuldverschreibungen Zins- und Dividendenscheine sowie zum Einzug erhaltene Papiere,"Cheques, matured debt securities, interest and dividend coupons, and other items received for collection that must be presented within 30 days and already credited to the customer. Sub-item of HV11/170."
    33ŌåÆHV11_172,Assets leased,Leasinggegenst├żnde,"Assets held as lessor under leasing agreements, unless financial leasing (ŌåÆ HV11/071). Sub-item of HV11/170."
    34ŌåÆHV11_173,Prepayments for savings bonds and similar discount papers,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten f├╝r Sparbriefe und ├żhnliche Abzinsungspapiere,Balancing items from discounted savings bonds and similar discount paper issued at nominal value under liabilities. Sub-item of HV11/170.
    35ŌåÆHV11_174,Credit balance on items in process of settlement,Aktivsaldo der schwebenden Verrechnungen,Balance on items in process of settlement if asset items exceed liability items. Sub-item of HV11/170.
    36ŌåÆHV11_175,Tax receivables,Steuererstattungsansprueche,"Tax refund claims (Item 185): as well as deferred tax assets pursuant to Section 274 of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch), this item should also be used to record other tax assets arising from prepayments in anticipation of the tax assessment date. Payments to the tax office that are recognised as an expense in profit or loss should continue to be reported in the balance of the expense and income accounts (HV11/175 and HV21/325 respectively) and not in this item."
    37ŌåÆHV11_176,Prepaid expenses and accrued income,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten Aktiva,Prepaid expenses unless recorded under HV11/173 (Item 184): expenditures paid before the reporting date but attributable to a future accounting period. Item 173 (Prepayments and accrued income for savings bonds and similar discount papers): any balancing items deriving from discounted savings bonds and similar discount paper issued are to be recorded here if they are shown at nominal value under liabilities; the amounts ascertained for the most recent annual accounts plus the balancing items formed since then for newly issued paper may be used; such paper at the issue amount plus accrued interest may also be used.
    38ŌåÆHV11_180,Total assets,Summe der Aktiva,Sum of all HV11 balance sheet asset items.
    39ŌåÆHV12_011,Domestic legal tender,Inl├żndische gesetzliche Zahlungsmittel,Only euro banknotes and coins and legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro. Sub-item of HV11/010 Cash in hand.
    40ŌåÆHV12_041,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing with Deutsche Bundesbank,Schatzwechsel refinanzierbar bei der Deutschen Bundesbank,Public-body debt instruments eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank. Instruments eligible with both Bundesbank and other central banks ŌåÆ here only. Sub-item of HV11/040.
    41ŌåÆHV12_042,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing with other establishment-country central banks,Schatzwechsel refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsl├żndern,Public-body debt instruments eligible for refinancing not with the Bundesbank but with central banks in other countries in which the reporting bank is established. Sub-item of HV11/040.
    42ŌåÆHV12_048,Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark,Auf D-Mark lautende Zahlungsmittel,Banknotes and coins denominated in Deutsche Mark reported under HV11/010 and HV12/011 (if accepted in exchange for euro). Memo sub-item.
    43ŌåÆHV12_052,Bills eligible for refinancing with other establishment-country central banks,Wechsel refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsl├żndern,Bills eligible for refinancing not with the Bundesbank but with central banks in other countries in which the reporting bank is established. Sub-item of HV11/050.
    44ŌåÆHV12_079,ECB debt securities,Schuldverschreibungen der EZB,ECB debt securities. Included in and shown separately within HV11/081 Money market paper.
    45ŌåÆHV12_083,Own debt securities (repurchased),Eigene Schuldverschreibungen,"Repurchased own negotiable debt securities (subordinated and non-subordinated). Non-negotiable own securities deducted from HV21/231, HV21/232 or HV21/280. Sub-item of HV11/080."
    46ŌåÆHV12_084,Floating rate notes,Variabel verzinsliche Anleihen,Floating rate notes under HV11/082 whose interest rate has not been fixed for entire maturity. Foreign currency floating rate notes also in HV12/086. Sub-item of HV11/082.
    47ŌåÆHV12_085,Zero coupon bonds,Null-Kupon-Anleihen,Securities under HV11/082 on which interest is paid only on redemption. Book value = purchase price plus accrued interest. Stripped bonds excluded. Sub-item of HV11/082.
    48ŌåÆHV12_086,Foreign currency bonds,Fremdw├żhrungsanleihen,"Bonds not denominated in euro, ECU, Deutsche Mark or legacy euro-area currencies. Foreign currency floating rate notes (HV12/084) and foreign currency zero coupon bonds (HV12/085) also shown here. Sub-item of HV11/082."
    49ŌåÆHV12_101,Nominal value of participating interests in domestic banks (MFIs),Nennbetrag der Beteiligungen an inl├żndischen Banken einschlie├¤lich Gesch├żftsguthaben bei Kreditgenossenschaften,Total nominal value of participating interests/shares in affiliated domestic banks from HV11/100 and HV11/110. For no-par stock: accounting par value used.
    50ŌåÆHV12_141,Real estate holdings,darunter Immobilienbest├żnde,"Dwellings, other buildings and structures (existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents, including real estate for own use. Sub-item of HV11/140."
    51ŌåÆHV12_177,Options and futures market position payments (assets),Optionspreise und Terminmarktpositionen Aktiva,Option premiums paid and variation margins for non-trading-portfolio derivatives; initial margins for all unsettled derivatives. Sub-item of HV11/176 Others.
    52ŌåÆHV12_178,Interest accrued on loans,Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Kredite,Calculated and booked accrued interest on loans. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV12/189. Sub-item of HV11/176 Others.
    53ŌåÆHV12_179,Claims underlying traditional securitisations ŌĆö removal originator and servicer,Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen mit Bilanzabgang Originator und Servicer,Book value of ABS underlying claims where institution sold with derecognition and manages as servicer (true sale). Synthetic transactions excluded. Sub-item of HV11/176.
    54ŌåÆHV12_181,Claims underlying traditional securitisations ŌĆö servicer only not originator,Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen kein Originator nur Servicer,Book value of ABS underlying claims managed as servicer where institution is not the originator. Sub-item of HV11/176.
    55ŌåÆHV12_182,Claims underlying traditional securitisations ŌĆö no removal originator,Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen ohne Bilanzabgang Originator,Book value of ABS underlying claims where institution is originator but no balance sheet derecognition (on-balance true sale). Sub-item of HV11/176.
    56ŌåÆHV12_183,Interest accrued on securities (assets side),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Wertpapiere Aktiva,Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities on assets side. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV12/190. Sub-item of HV11/176.
    57ŌåÆHV12_184,Prepaid expenses,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten (soweit nicht unter HV11/173),"Expenditures paid before reporting date but attributable to future period, unless reported under HV11/173. Sub-item of HV11/176."
    58ŌåÆHV12_185,Tax refund claims,Steuererstattungsanspr├╝che HV12,Deferred tax assets (Section 274 HGB) and other tax assets from prepayments ahead of tax assessment. Sub-item of HV11/176.
    59ŌåÆHV12_186,Derivative financial instruments in trading portfolio (positive value),Derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands positiv,Trading portfolio derivatives with positive fair value (Section 340e(3) HGB) and option premiums paid. Measured at fair value excluding accrued interest (ŌåÆ HV12/198). Sub-item of HV11/176.
    60ŌåÆHV12_187,Currency adjustment item (assets),W├żhrungsausgleichsposten Aktiva,Differences from converting foreign currency assets into euro at reporting date exchange rate. Sub-item of HV11/176.
    61ŌåÆHV12_188,Working capital at foreign branches,Betriebskapital in ausl├żndischen Zweigstellen,Working capital supplied to legally dependent foreign branches. Only for institutions with legally dependent branches abroad. Sub-item of HV11/176.
    62ŌåÆHV12_189,Negative interest accrued on loans,Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Kredite,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on loans. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV12/178.
    63ŌåÆHV12_190,Negative interest accrued on securities (assets),Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Wertpapier Aktiva,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on securities on assets side. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV12/183.
    64ŌåÆHV12_192_195,Bills protested and cheques unpaid during reporting month,Im Berichtsmonat zu Protest gegebene Wechsel und nicht eingel├Čste Schecks,Bills protested by the reporting institution and cheques noted for non-payment during the reporting month (Items 192ŌĆō195).
    65ŌåÆHV12_196,Trading portfolio memo (assets),Handelsbestand Aktiva nachrichtlich,"Memo item: portions of HV11/040, HV11/060, HV11/070, HV11/080 and HV11/090 attributable to the trading portfolio, reported separately."
    66ŌåÆHV12_197,Derivative financial instruments excluded from trading portfolio (assets),Derivative Finanzinstrumente nicht Handelsbestand Aktiva,"Derivatives not in trading portfolio, measured at documented fair value net of accrued interest. All positive amounts here; all negative amounts ŌåÆ HV22/511."
    67ŌåÆHV12_198,Interest accrued on trading portfolio derivatives (assets),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands Aktiva,Accrued interest on trading portfolio derivatives where reported separately from HV12/186. See HV12/186.
    68ŌåÆHV12_213,Servicing loans ŌĆö sold with removal as originator,Servicing-Kredite mit Bilanzabgang Originator,Loans without securitisation sold with balance-sheet removal where institution is originator and servicer. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 1 of line 905.
    69ŌåÆHV12_214,Servicing loans ŌĆö sold without removal as originator,Servicing-Kredite ohne Bilanzabgang Originator,Loans without securitisation sold without balance-sheet removal where institution is originator and servicer. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 2 of line 905.
    70ŌåÆHV12_215,Servicing loans ŌĆö servicer only not originator,Servicing-Kredite nur Servicer kein Originator,Loans without securitisation where institution only performs servicing without being originator. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 3 of line 905.
    71ŌåÆHV12_700_704,Trading portfolio ŌĆö breakdown by asset class,Handelsbestand nach Assetklassen,"Breakdown of trading portfolio components included in HV11/040, HV11/060, HV11/070, HV11/080 and HV11/090 (Items 700ŌĆō704)."
    72ŌåÆHV12_760,Ledger level before value adjustments ŌĆö loans to banks,Buchungsstand vor Abzug EWB Forderungen an Banken,Ledger level for HV11/060 before deduction of specific (individual) value adjustments.
    73ŌåÆHV12_770,Ledger level before value adjustments ŌĆö loans to non-banks,Buchungsstand vor Abzug EWB Forderungen an Nichtbanken,Ledger level for HV11/070 before deduction of specific (individual) value adjustments.
    74ŌåÆHV21_210,Liabilities to banks (MFIs),Verbindlichkeiten gegenueber Kreditinstituten,"All liabilities to domestic or foreign banks and central banks arising from banking transactions, other than securitised liabilities (HV21/230) or subordinated liabilities (HV21/280) (Item 210). Includes: liabilities from savings bonds (other than bearer paper) and similar registered savings bonds, other registered debt securities, income bonds, premium savings bonds, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, and registered money market paper; credit balances on clearing accounts for banks; liabilities from genuine sale and repurchase transactions; liabilities to the Deutsche Bundesbank from open market loans and overnight loans taken up in the context of the marginal lending facility; liabilities to the ECB related to management of the ECB's capital and foreign reserves; syndicated loans raised ŌĆö shown separately under HV22/211. Also includes, if not yet transmitted by the reporting date, interest and principal received from non-banks for administered loans. Banks with a building and loan division also record here liabilities to the legally dependent building and loan division."
    75ŌåÆHV21_211,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/210),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/210),Syndicated loans raised from other banks included in HV21/210. Sub-item of HV21/210.
    76ŌåÆHV21_220,Other liabilities to non-banks (non-MFIs),Andere Verbindlichkeiten gegenueber Kunden (Nicht-MFI),All liabilities to domestic and foreign non-banks other than securitised liabilities (HV21/230) or subordinated liabilities (HV21/280) (Item 222). Includes: liabilities from genuine sale and repurchase transactions; order debt securities not forming part of a total issue; registered money market paper; savings bonds (other than bearer paper) and similar registered savings bonds; other registered debt securities; savings bank income bonds; premium savings bonds issued by credit cooperatives and similar registered income bonds; blocked balances and settlement balances of instalment sales financing firms; purchase coupons in circulation; credit card accounts showing a credit balance through payment or overpayment by the customer; liabilities incurred via another bank as fiduciary payments in favour of a specifically designated customer. Transmitted funds received directly from the non-bank in question ŌåÆ here; if received from an intermediary third bank ŌåÆ HV21/210. Syndicated loans taken out shown separately under HV22/223.
    77ŌåÆHV21_221,Savings deposits,Spareinlagen,Funds without specified maturity satisfying Section 21(4) RechKredV. Includes Altersverm├Čgensgesetz retirement provisions and credited government allowances. Sub-item of HV21/220.
    78ŌåÆHV21_222,Savings deposits,Spareinlagen,Only those funds without a specified maturity which satisfy the requirements of Section 21(4) of the German Regulation on the Accounting of Credit Institutions (RechKredV) are to be shown as savings deposits (Item 221). Section 39(6) of the RechKredV is to be applied. Also includes retirement provisions pursuant to the German Retirement Pension Act (Altersverm├Čgensgesetz) and credited government allowances for these provisions. Amounts saved under premium saving schemes credited to a collective account and not earmarked for drawing may be shown as savings deposits if it has been agreed that the amounts saved will later be credited to a savings account.
    79ŌåÆHV21_223,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/220),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/220),Syndicated loans raised from non-banks included in HV21/220. Sub-item of HV21/220.
    80ŌåÆHV21_224,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/280),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/280),Syndicated loans raised and included in HV21/280 Subordinated liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/280.

file.content:
item,name_en,name_de,description
HV11_010,Cash in hand,Kassenbestand,"Legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps. Deutsche Mark and legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro also reported here. Commemorative coins above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176 Others. Sub-items: HV12/011 Domestic legal tender, HV12/048 Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark."
HV11_011,Cash reserves,Barreserve,"Cash in hand (Item 010): legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps; Deutsche Mark and legacy currencies of other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also reported here; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176. Balances with central banks (Item 020): only those balances readily available at all times including foreign currency overnight balances with the central banks of all countries in which the reporting institution is established; other balances such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from sale and repurchase transactions, and time deposits are to be shown under HV11/061."
HV11_020,Balances with central banks,Guthaben bei Zentralnotenbanken,"Only balances readily available at all times, including foreign currency overnight balances with central banks of all countries in which the reporting bank is established. Other balances (overnight deposits at Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from repurchase transactions, time deposits) ŌåÆ HV11/061. Sub-item of HV11/011 Barreserve aggregate."
HV11_021,Treasury bills,Schatzwechsel und unverzinsliche Schatzanweisungen,"Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments issued by public bodies that have been discounted and are eligible for refinancing with the central banks of the countries in which the reporting bank is established, with original maturity not exceeding one year (Item 040). Debt instruments of public bodies failing these conditions are to be shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) or HV11/082 (Bonds and notes) if they are negotiable, and under HV11/071 (Loans and advances to non-banks) if they are not. Public bodies include government bodies, their special funds and other off-budget entities. Includes instruments eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank (Item 041) and those eligible with central banks of other establishment countries (Item 042)."
HV11_031,Other public-sector debt instruments,Schuldtitel oeffentlicher Stellen,"Debt instruments of public bodies eligible for central bank refinancing other than treasury bills reported under HV11/021, and longer-dated public-sector instruments not eligible for refinancing with central banks. Short-term instruments of public bodies that do not meet the maturity condition of HV11/021 are shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) if negotiable. Longer-dated negotiable public-sector bonds are shown under HV11/082 (Bonds and notes). Non-negotiable instruments ŌåÆ HV11/071. This item captures the residual public-sector debt instrument positions not classified elsewhere in the HV11 form."
HV11_040,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing,Schatzwechsel und ├żhnliche refinanzierbare Schuldtitel ├Čffentlicher Stellen,"Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar public-body instruments, discounted, eligible for central bank refinancing, original maturity Ōēż 1 year. Non-qualifying instruments ŌåÆ HV11/081 or HV11/082 if negotiable, or HV11/071 if not. Sub-items: HV12/041 (Bundesbank) and HV12/042 (other establishment-country central banks)."
HV11_050,Bills eligible for refinancing,Wechsel refinanzierbar,"Bills held in portfolio eligible for central bank refinancing, other than bills for collection. Bills not discounted and credited to customers, collateral bills, and instalment sales bills not discounted are not reported here. Sub-item: HV12/052."
HV11_060,Loans and advances to banks (MFIs) ŌĆö total,Forderungen an Banken (MFIs),Aggregate of all loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks from banking transactions (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/061 and bills from banks HV11/062.
HV11_061,Loans and advances to banks (MFIs),Forderungen an Kreditinstitute,"All types of loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks arising from banking transactions, including bills accepted from banks other than those recorded under Item 050 (bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 060/061). Also includes: claims from genuine repurchase transactions; registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable certificates held vis-├Ā-vis banks; registered participation certificates and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates; claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank from overnight deposits, time deposits and securities repurchase agreements (other than the readily available balances of HV11/020), as well as balances and foreign currency balances with central banks of establishment countries that are not readily available at all times; debit balances in clearing accounts for banks; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; and amounts saved under savings contracts with building and loan associations. Transmitted loans are recorded here if transmitted to an intermediary bank which lends the funds on in its own name. Redemption claims from securities and precious metal loans are not to be shown here."
HV11_062,Bills received from banks (other than under item 050),Wechsel die von Banken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst),"Bills discounted without recourse accepted from banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/060."
HV11_070,Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs) ŌĆö total,Forderungen an Nichtbanken (Nicht-MFIs),Aggregate of all loans and advances to non-banks (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/071 and bills from non-banks HV11/072.
HV11_071,Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs),Forderungen an Kunden,"All types of assets constituting loans and advances to domestic and foreign non-banks, other than bills within the meaning of Item 050 (Bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 070/071). Includes: registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities and certificates, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable bearer money market paper, registered and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates and other repayable securitised participation rights; claims from genuine repurchase transactions; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; trade receivables from own trading in goods; claims from returned cheques and redrafted bills; loans backed by bills not discounted and credited to borrowers; financial leasing claims. Claims from borrower's note transactions (Schuldscheingesch├żfte or Teilschuldscheingesch├żfte) are shown here depending on the obligor. Only the total amount of loans outstanding is to be recorded ŌĆö not the total amount of lending commitments. Transmitted loans passed to an intermediary bank ŌåÆ HV11/061."
HV11_072,Bills received from non-banks (other than under item 050),Wechsel die von Nichtbanken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst),"Bills discounted without recourse accepted from non-banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/070."
HV11_080,Debt instruments,Schuldverschreibungen und andere festverzinsliche Wertpapiere,"Bonds and notes (Item 082): if negotiable, includes fixed interest bearer debt securities, order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes (Kassenobligationen) and Debt Register claims; interest coupons received before maturity or tradable separately; securities pledged to the Deutsche Bundesbank as collateral for open market and overnight loans; perpetual bonds. Covers government bonds (including Bundesschatzanweisungen and Sch├żtze), state government, local government, corporate bonds and bank debt securities including Pfandbriefe. Zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds tied to index or interbank rates and asset-backed securities are also deemed fixed interest securities. Negotiable certificates (structured bonds, participation certificates, index-linked bonds) are included if they are debt securities under Section 793 German Civil Code. Money market paper (Item 081): negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) other than those issued by public bodies falling under Item 040, with original maturity up to and including one year. ECB debt securities (Item 079) are also included."
HV11_081,Money market paper,Geldmarktpapiere (soweit nicht in Position 040 erfasst),"Negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) with original maturity Ōēż 1 year, other than public-body instruments under HV11/040. ECB debt securities (HV12/079) included here. Sub-item of HV11/080."
HV11_082,Bonds and notes,Anleihen und Schuldverschreibungen,"Fixed interest bearer and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes, Debt Register claims, perpetual bonds, zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds, ABS, and negotiable structured certificates. Sub-item of HV11/080. Sub-items: HV12/084 Floating rate notes, HV12/085 Zero coupon bonds, HV12/086 Foreign currency bonds."
HV11_090,Shares and other variable-yield securities,Aktien und andere nicht festverzinsliche Wertpapiere,"Shares and other variable-yield securities other than those recorded under HV11/100 (Participating interests) or HV11/110 (Shares in affiliated enterprises). Includes: temporary stock certificates, subscription rights, mutual fund shares (including property fund certificates issued by open-ended real estate funds), warrants, dividend coupons, negotiable bearer or order participation certificates and other variable yield securities provided they are listed on a stock exchange. Dividend coupons received before maturities are also included. Repurchased options on own securities are to be deducted from liability item HV21/234. Short sales of securities not held on the balance sheet result in negative amounts."
HV11_100,Participations,Beteiligungen,"Participating interests and amounts paid up on cooperative society shares (Item 100). Includes ownership interests not evidenced by securities: shares in private limited companies, participating interests held as a personally liable partner in general partnerships, limited partnerships, limited companies with one or more general partners (Kommanditgesellschaften auf Aktien, KGaA), shares held by limited partners, and participating interests of silent partners qualifying as balance sheet equity. Shares in incorporated enterprises whose nominal values in the aggregate exceed one-fifth of the nominal capital of the enterprise are deemed to be participating interests in cases of doubt. Amounts paid up on cooperative society shares are included. For participating interests in affiliated enterprises see HV11/110."
HV11_110,Shares in affiliated enterprises,Anteile an verbundenen Unternehmen,Shares in affiliated enterprises including ownership interests not evidenced by securities (Item 110). These are to be shown here even if they constitute participating interests. Covers all interests in domestic and foreign subsidiaries and other affiliated enterprises where the reporting institution exercises controlling influence.
HV11_120,Trust assets,Treuhandvermoegen,"Assets which the reporting institution administers in its own name but on behalf of third parties (Item 120). The amounts shown under HV11/120 and HV21/240 must tally. Comprises: fiduciary loans (Item 121) ŌĆö loans recorded under HV11/061 or HV11/071 to the extent they relate to banks or non-banks respectively, classified by obligor; securities managed on a fiduciary basis (Item 122) ŌĆö shares and other variable yield securities as well as negotiable debt instruments held in the bank's own name but on behalf of third parties (non-negotiable debt instruments and other fixed income securities ŌåÆ HV11/123); other fiduciary assets (Item 123) ŌĆö e.g. participating interests and land and buildings managed on a fiduciary basis. Securities kept in safe custody for customers as part of safe custody business are not deemed to be securities managed on a fiduciary basis."
HV11_121,Fiduciary loans,Treuhandkredite,Loans within fiduciary assets (HV11/120) relating to banks (per HV11/061) or non-banks (HV11/071) classified by obligor. Sub-item of HV11/120.
HV11_122,Securities managed on a fiduciary basis,Treuh├żnderisch gehaltene Wertpapiere,Shares and negotiable debt instruments held in bank's own name on behalf of third parties. Non-negotiable debt instruments ŌåÆ HV11/123. Sub-item of HV11/120.
HV11_123,Other fiduciary assets,Sonstiges Treuhandverm├Čgen,"Participating interests, land and buildings, and non-negotiable fixed income securities managed on fiduciary basis. Sub-item of HV11/120."
HV11_130,Equalisation claims against public authorities,Ausgleichsforderungen gegen oeffentliche Hand,Equalisation claims on general government including debt securities resulting from conversion of equalisation claims (Item 130). Equalisation claims on the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund are to be recorded here. Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created as a result of the conversion of equalisation claims are also to be included irrespective of whether the reporting institution obtained the debt securities as a result of converting its own equalisation claims or bought them from another institution or a foreign trade enterprise. The sub-item debt securities resulting from the conversion of equalisation claims (Item 131) is to be shown separately.
HV11_131,Debt securities from conversion of equalisation claims,Schuldverschreibungen aus dem Umtausch von Ausgleichsforderungen,Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created by converting equalisation claims. Sub-item of HV11/130.
HV11_140,Intangible assets,Immaterielle Anlagewerte,"Intangible assets are included as a component of HV11/176 (Others) in the BISTA guidelines. Item 176 includes: intangible assets such as purchased goodwill and as a general rule computer software; internally generated intangible fixed assets; internally generated industrial and similar rights and assets; purchased concessions, industrial and similar rights and assets, and licences in such rights and assets; and goodwill. Reported at cost less accumulated amortisation. These assets are not to be included under Item 140 (Tangible assets) or any other dedicated balance sheet item."
HV11_150,Property and equipment,Sachanlagen,"Tangible assets (Item 140): land and buildings and furniture and equipment provided that they constitute fixed assets. Intangible assets and current assets ŌĆö e.g. real estate acquired as a safeguard against loan losses if held by the reporting institution for a period of not more than five years ŌĆö are not to be shown here but under HV11/176 (Others). Includes real estate holdings (Item 141 of which: Immobilienbest├żnde) ŌĆö dwellings, other buildings and structures (both existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents including real estate for own use."
HV11_160,Unpaid contributions to subscribed capital,Ausstehende Einlagen auf gezeichnetes Kapital,Subscribed capital unpaid (Item 150): amounts which shareholders have subscribed to the capital of the reporting institution that have been called but not yet paid in cash. Recorded as an asset when the payment obligation is formally established. For the corresponding liability-side counterpart (gross subscribed capital) see HV21/311.
HV11_161,Nominal value of own shares,Nennbetrag der eigenen Aktien oder Anteile,Nominal value of own shares (HV11/160). For no-par stock: accounting par value = issued capital divided by number of shares issued.
HV11_170,Other assets,Sonstige Vermoegensgegenst├żnde,"Only those assets which cannot or cannot yet be assigned to another item are to be included (Item 170). Comprises: accrued interest on asset items calculated in connection with preparation of the annual accounts; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins (even if legal tender), gold bullion and delivery claims on precious metal accounts; participation rights not evidenced by securities and not repayable; options not evidenced by securities and resulting from option dealings (paid option prices) as well as cover and adjustment payments for open futures market positions (security deposits, initial margins and variation margins paid) ŌĆö shown separately under HV12/177; working capital supplied to foreign branches ŌĆö HV12/188; stock on hand of credit cooperatives trading in goods; land and buildings acquired as a safeguard against loan losses held for not more than five years; derivative financial instruments in the trading portfolio with positive fair values within the meaning of Section 340e(3) HGB ŌĆö shown separately under HV12/186; currency conversion differential ŌĆö HV12/187; prepaid expenses ŌĆö HV12/184; advance tax payments ŌĆö HV12/185; intangible assets (purchased goodwill and computer software as a general rule); and any other assets that cannot be assigned to another item."
HV11_171,Cheques and items received for collection,Schecks f├żllige Schuldverschreibungen Zins- und Dividendenscheine sowie zum Einzug erhaltene Papiere,"Cheques, matured debt securities, interest and dividend coupons, and other items received for collection that must be presented within 30 days and already credited to the customer. Sub-item of HV11/170."
HV11_172,Assets leased,Leasinggegenst├żnde,"Assets held as lessor under leasing agreements, unless financial leasing (ŌåÆ HV11/071). Sub-item of HV11/170."
HV11_173,Prepayments for savings bonds and similar discount papers,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten f├╝r Sparbriefe und ├żhnliche Abzinsungspapiere,Balancing items from discounted savings bonds and similar discount paper issued at nominal value under liabilities. Sub-item of HV11/170.
HV11_174,Credit balance on items in process of settlement,Aktivsaldo der schwebenden Verrechnungen,Balance on items in process of settlement if asset items exceed liability items. Sub-item of HV11/170.
HV11_175,Tax receivables,Steuererstattungsansprueche,"Tax refund claims (Item 185): as well as deferred tax assets pursuant to Section 274 of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch), this item should also be used to record other tax assets arising from prepayments in anticipation of the tax assessment date. Payments to the tax office that are recognised as an expense in profit or loss should continue to be reported in the balance of the expense and income accounts (HV11/175 and HV21/325 respectively) and not in this item."
HV11_176,Prepaid expenses and accrued income,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten Aktiva,Prepaid expenses unless recorded under HV11/173 (Item 184): expenditures paid before the reporting date but attributable to a future accounting period. Item 173 (Prepayments and accrued income for savings bonds and similar discount papers): any balancing items deriving from discounted savings bonds and similar discount paper issued are to be recorded here if they are shown at nominal value under liabilities; the amounts ascertained for the most recent annual accounts plus the balancing items formed since then for newly issued paper may be used; such paper at the issue amount plus accrued interest may also be used.
HV11_180,Total assets,Summe der Aktiva,Sum of all HV11 balance sheet asset items.
HV12_011,Domestic legal tender,Inl├żndische gesetzliche Zahlungsmittel,Only euro banknotes and coins and legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro. Sub-item of HV11/010 Cash in hand.
HV12_041,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing with Deutsche Bundesbank,Schatzwechsel refinanzierbar bei der Deutschen Bundesbank,Public-body debt instruments eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank. Instruments eligible with both Bundesbank and other central banks ŌåÆ here only. Sub-item of HV11/040.
HV12_042,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing with other establishment-country central banks,Schatzwechsel refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsl├żndern,Public-body debt instruments eligible for refinancing not with the Bundesbank but with central banks in other countries in which the reporting bank is established. Sub-item of HV11/040.
HV12_048,Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark,Auf D-Mark lautende Zahlungsmittel,Banknotes and coins denominated in Deutsche Mark reported under HV11/010 and HV12/011 (if accepted in exchange for euro). Memo sub-item.
HV12_052,Bills eligible for refinancing with other establishment-country central banks,Wechsel refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsl├żndern,Bills eligible for refinancing not with the Bundesbank but with central banks in other countries in which the reporting bank is established. Sub-item of HV11/050.
HV12_079,ECB debt securities,Schuldverschreibungen der EZB,ECB debt securities. Included in and shown separately within HV11/081 Money market paper.
HV12_083,Own debt securities (repurchased),Eigene Schuldverschreibungen,"Repurchased own negotiable debt securities (subordinated and non-subordinated). Non-negotiable own securities deducted from HV21/231, HV21/232 or HV21/280. Sub-item of HV11/080."
HV12_084,Floating rate notes,Variabel verzinsliche Anleihen,Floating rate notes under HV11/082 whose interest rate has not been fixed for entire maturity. Foreign currency floating rate notes also in HV12/086. Sub-item of HV11/082.
HV12_085,Zero coupon bonds,Null-Kupon-Anleihen,Securities under HV11/082 on which interest is paid only on redemption. Book value = purchase price plus accrued interest. Stripped bonds excluded. Sub-item of HV11/082.
HV12_086,Foreign currency bonds,Fremdw├żhrungsanleihen,"Bonds not denominated in euro, ECU, Deutsche Mark or legacy euro-area currencies. Foreign currency floating rate notes (HV12/084) and foreign currency zero coupon bonds (HV12/085) also shown here. Sub-item of HV11/082."
HV12_101,Nominal value of participating interests in domestic banks (MFIs),Nennbetrag der Beteiligungen an inl├żndischen Banken einschlie├¤lich Gesch├żftsguthaben bei Kreditgenossenschaften,Total nominal value of participating interests/shares in affiliated domestic banks from HV11/100 and HV11/110. For no-par stock: accounting par value used.
HV12_141,Real estate holdings,darunter Immobilienbest├żnde,"Dwellings, other buildings and structures (existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents, including real estate for own use. Sub-item of HV11/140."
HV12_177,Options and futures market position payments (assets),Optionspreise und Terminmarktpositionen Aktiva,Option premiums paid and variation margins for non-trading-portfolio derivatives; initial margins for all unsettled derivatives. Sub-item of HV11/176 Others.
HV12_178,Interest accrued on loans,Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Kredite,Calculated and booked accrued interest on loans. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV12/189. Sub-item of HV11/176 Others.
HV12_179,Claims underlying traditional securitisations ŌĆö removal originator and servicer,Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen mit Bilanzabgang Originator und Servicer,Book value of ABS underlying claims where institution sold with derecognition and manages as servicer (true sale). Synthetic transactions excluded. Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_181,Claims underlying traditional securitisations ŌĆö servicer only not originator,Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen kein Originator nur Servicer,Book value of ABS underlying claims managed as servicer where institution is not the originator. Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_182,Claims underlying traditional securitisations ŌĆö no removal originator,Forderungen traditioneller Verbriefungen ohne Bilanzabgang Originator,Book value of ABS underlying claims where institution is originator but no balance sheet derecognition (on-balance true sale). Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_183,Interest accrued on securities (assets side),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Wertpapiere Aktiva,Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities on assets side. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV12/190. Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_184,Prepaid expenses,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten (soweit nicht unter HV11/173),"Expenditures paid before reporting date but attributable to future period, unless reported under HV11/173. Sub-item of HV11/176."
HV12_185,Tax refund claims,Steuererstattungsanspr├╝che HV12,Deferred tax assets (Section 274 HGB) and other tax assets from prepayments ahead of tax assessment. Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_186,Derivative financial instruments in trading portfolio (positive value),Derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands positiv,Trading portfolio derivatives with positive fair value (Section 340e(3) HGB) and option premiums paid. Measured at fair value excluding accrued interest (ŌåÆ HV12/198). Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_187,Currency adjustment item (assets),W├żhrungsausgleichsposten Aktiva,Differences from converting foreign currency assets into euro at reporting date exchange rate. Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_188,Working capital at foreign branches,Betriebskapital in ausl├żndischen Zweigstellen,Working capital supplied to legally dependent foreign branches. Only for institutions with legally dependent branches abroad. Sub-item of HV11/176.
HV12_189,Negative interest accrued on loans,Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Kredite,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on loans. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV12/178.
HV12_190,Negative interest accrued on securities (assets),Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Wertpapier Aktiva,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on securities on assets side. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV12/183.
HV12_192_195,Bills protested and cheques unpaid during reporting month,Im Berichtsmonat zu Protest gegebene Wechsel und nicht eingel├Čste Schecks,Bills protested by the reporting institution and cheques noted for non-payment during the reporting month (Items 192ŌĆō195).
HV12_196,Trading portfolio memo (assets),Handelsbestand Aktiva nachrichtlich,"Memo item: portions of HV11/040, HV11/060, HV11/070, HV11/080 and HV11/090 attributable to the trading portfolio, reported separately."
HV12_197,Derivative financial instruments excluded from trading portfolio (assets),Derivative Finanzinstrumente nicht Handelsbestand Aktiva,"Derivatives not in trading portfolio, measured at documented fair value net of accrued interest. All positive amounts here; all negative amounts ŌåÆ HV22/511."
HV12_198,Interest accrued on trading portfolio derivatives (assets),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands Aktiva,Accrued interest on trading portfolio derivatives where reported separately from HV12/186. See HV12/186.
HV12_213,Servicing loans ŌĆö sold with removal as originator,Servicing-Kredite mit Bilanzabgang Originator,Loans without securitisation sold with balance-sheet removal where institution is originator and servicer. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 1 of line 905.
HV12_214,Servicing loans ŌĆö sold without removal as originator,Servicing-Kredite ohne Bilanzabgang Originator,Loans without securitisation sold without balance-sheet removal where institution is originator and servicer. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 2 of line 905.
HV12_215,Servicing loans ŌĆö servicer only not originator,Servicing-Kredite nur Servicer kein Originator,Loans without securitisation where institution only performs servicing without being originator. Corresponds to Annex Q1 code No 3 of line 905.
HV12_700_704,Trading portfolio ŌĆö breakdown by asset class,Handelsbestand nach Assetklassen,"Breakdown of trading portfolio components included in HV11/040, HV11/060, HV11/070, HV11/080 and HV11/090 (Items 700ŌĆō704)."
HV12_760,Ledger level before value adjustments ŌĆö loans to banks,Buchungsstand vor Abzug EWB Forderungen an Banken,Ledger level for HV11/060 before deduction of specific (individual) value adjustments.
HV12_770,Ledger level before value adjustments ŌĆö loans to non-banks,Buchungsstand vor Abzug EWB Forderungen an Nichtbanken,Ledger level for HV11/070 before deduction of specific (individual) value adjustments.
HV21_210,Liabilities to banks (MFIs),Verbindlichkeiten gegenueber Kreditinstituten,"All liabilities to domestic or foreign banks and central banks arising from banking transactions, other than securitised liabilities (HV21/230) or subordinated liabilities (HV21/280) (Item 210). Includes: liabilities from savings bonds (other than bearer paper) and similar registered savings bonds, other registered debt securities, income bonds, premium savings bonds, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, and registered money market paper; credit balances on clearing accounts for banks; liabilities from genuine sale and repurchase transactions; liabilities to the Deutsche Bundesbank from open market loans and overnight loans taken up in the context of the marginal lending facility; liabilities to the ECB related to management of the ECB's capital and foreign reserves; syndicated loans raised ŌĆö shown separately under HV22/211. Also includes, if not yet transmitted by the reporting date, interest and principal received from non-banks for administered loans. Banks with a building and loan division also record here liabilities to the legally dependent building and loan division."
HV21_211,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/210),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/210),Syndicated loans raised from other banks included in HV21/210. Sub-item of HV21/210.
HV21_220,Other liabilities to non-banks (non-MFIs),Andere Verbindlichkeiten gegenueber Kunden (Nicht-MFI),All liabilities to domestic and foreign non-banks other than securitised liabilities (HV21/230) or subordinated liabilities (HV21/280) (Item 222). Includes: liabilities from genuine sale and repurchase transactions; order debt securities not forming part of a total issue; registered money market paper; savings bonds (other than bearer paper) and similar registered savings bonds; other registered debt securities; savings bank income bonds; premium savings bonds issued by credit cooperatives and similar registered income bonds; blocked balances and settlement balances of instalment sales financing firms; purchase coupons in circulation; credit card accounts showing a credit balance through payment or overpayment by the customer; liabilities incurred via another bank as fiduciary payments in favour of a specifically designated customer. Transmitted funds received directly from the non-bank in question ŌåÆ here; if received from an intermediary third bank ŌåÆ HV21/210. Syndicated loans taken out shown separately under HV22/223.
HV21_221,Savings deposits,Spareinlagen,Funds without specified maturity satisfying Section 21(4) RechKredV. Includes Altersverm├Čgensgesetz retirement provisions and credited government allowances. Sub-item of HV21/220.
HV21_222,Savings deposits,Spareinlagen,Only those funds without a specified maturity which satisfy the requirements of Section 21(4) of the German Regulation on the Accounting of Credit Institutions (RechKredV) are to be shown as savings deposits (Item 221). Section 39(6) of the RechKredV is to be applied. Also includes retirement provisions pursuant to the German Retirement Pension Act (Altersverm├Čgensgesetz) and credited government allowances for these provisions. Amounts saved under premium saving schemes credited to a collective account and not earmarked for drawing may be shown as savings deposits if it has been agreed that the amounts saved will later be credited to a savings account.
HV21_223,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/220),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/220),Syndicated loans raised from non-banks included in HV21/220. Sub-item of HV21/220.
HV21_224,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/280),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/280),Syndicated loans raised and included in HV21/280 Subordinated liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/280.
