DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

Monthly balance sheet statistics guidelines
Unofficial English translation
Only the original German version is binding.

37

 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

Guidelines on the monthly balance sheet statistics of monetary
financial institutions (MFIs) and non-MFI credit institutions
Data collection scope
The monthly balance sheet statistics (BISTA) represent the most comprehensive statistical survey
of the banking industry in Germany and are at the core of the banking statistics reporting system.
Data are collected on the assets and liabilities of domestic banks (MFIs) and non-MFI credit
institutions, for the part of the institution located in Germany (domestic part), based on their books
at the end of the month. MFIs report their balance sheet and additional annexes providing
analyticallyimportant breakdowns of balance sheet items by debtor and creditor type, term and
sector.
Pursuant to Section 4 of the German Financial and Internal Capital Adequacy Information
Regulation (Verordnung zur Einreichung von Finanz- und Risikotragf├żhigkeitsinformationen,
FinaRisikoV), data reported to BISTA also serve as prudential financial information (statement of
assets and liabilities).
An overview of the reporting templates to be submitted by reporting agents (1. banks (MFIs)
(including electronic money institutions (MFIs)), 2. building and loan associations (MFIs) and 3.
non-MFI credit institutions) can be found in the section ŌĆ£List of reports from banks (MFIs) and nonMFI credit institutions for the monthly balance sheet statisticsŌĆØ.
See ŌĆ£List of reports from banks (MFIs) and non-MFI credit institutions for the monthly balance sheet statisticsŌĆØ.

38

 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

Guidelines on the individual items on the main templates
((HV1) and (HV2))
1

I. Assets (HV11 and HV12)
Item 010 Cash in hand
(Kassenbestand)
Legal tender, including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps are to be
shown under this item. Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or the legacy currencies of the
other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also to be reported here.
Commemorative coins bought at a price higher than the face value, gold coins (even if they are legal
tender) and gold bullion are to be shown under item HV11/176 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.
Item 011 Domestic legal tender
(Inl├żndische gesetzliche Zahlungsmittel)
Only euro banknotes and coins and legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or the legacy
currencies of the other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro as reported under
ŌĆ£cash in handŌĆØ are to be shown under this item.
Item 020 Balances with central banks
(Guthaben bei Zentralnotenbanken)
This item may include only those balances that are readily available at all times, including foreign
currency overnight balances with the central banks of the countries in which the reporting bank is
established. Other balances, such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit
facility, as well as claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank arising from sale and repurchase transactions
and time deposits are to be shown under item HV11/061 ŌĆ£Loans and advances to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ.
Loans from central banks, e.g. overnight loans taken up through the Bundesbank marginal lending
facility, or other loans and advances repayable on demand are not to be deducted from the balances
but shown under item HV21/210 ŌĆ£Liabilities to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ. Any credit balances recorded in the
Bundesbank giro account are to be shown under item HV21/326 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.
ŌĆ£Countries in which the reporting bank is establishedŌĆØ are all countries ŌĆō including the country in which the head office of the
reporting institution is established ŌĆō in which the institution conducts banking business, offers services or is represented for
other reasons, irrespective of the form (office, branch, representative office) in which it operates in the country concerned.

Item 040 Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments issued by
public bodies and eligible for refinancingŌĆ”
(Schatzwechsel, unverzinsliche Schatzanweisungen und ├żhnliche Schuldtitel ├Čffentlicher
Stellen, refinanzierbarŌĆ”)

1

For building and loan associations, see also ŌĆ£Supplementary guidelines on the reports submitted by building and loan associations for the
monthly balance sheet statisticsŌĆØ (pp. 116 f.).

39

 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments which have been issued by
public bodies and discounted, are eligible for refinancing with the central banks of the countries in
which the reporting bank is established, and whose original maturity does not exceed one year are
to be shown under this item. Depending on their maturity, debt instruments issued by public bodies
which fail to fulfil the aforementioned conditions are to be shown under item HV11/081 ŌĆ£Money market
paperŌĆØ or under item HV11/082 ŌĆ£Bonds and notesŌĆØ if they are negotiable, and under item HV11/071
ŌĆ£Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs)ŌĆØ if they are not.
For the purposes of the above, public bodies are government bodies, including their special funds
and other off-budget entities which are part of the public sector.
For the definition of ŌĆ£countries in which the reporting bank is establishedŌĆØ, see item HV11/020 ŌĆ£Balances with central banksŌĆØ.

Item 041 Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments issued by
public bodies and eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank
(Schatzwechsel, unverzinsliche Schatzanweisungen und ├żhnliche Schuldtitel ├Čffentlicher
Stellen, refinanzierbar bei der Deutschen Bundesbank)
Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments which have been issued by
public bodies and are eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank are to be shown under
this item.
Debt instruments issued by central and state government and their special funds or off-budget entities
are always ŌĆ£eligible for refinancingŌĆØ with the Deutsche Bundesbank.
Debt instruments which are eligible for refinancing both with the Deutsche Bundesbank and with other
central banks are to be shown under this item only.
Item 042 Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments issued by
public bodies and eligible for refinancing with the central banks of other countries in which
the reporting bank is established
(Schatzwechsel, unverzinsliche Schatzanweisungen und ├żhnliche Schuldtitel ├Čffentlicher
Stellen, refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsl├żndern)
Debt instruments which have been issued by public bodies and are eligible for refinancing not with
the Deutsche Bundesbank but with central banks in other countries in which the reporting bank is
established are to be shown under this item.
For the definition of ŌĆ£countries in which the reporting bank is establishedŌĆØ, see item HV11/020 ŌĆ£Balances with central banksŌĆØ.

Item 048 Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark
(Auf D-Mark lautende Zahlungsmittel)
Banknotes and coins denominated in Deutsche Mark and reported under item HV11/010 ŌĆ£Cash in
handŌĆØ and item HV12/011 ŌĆ£Domestic legal tenderŌĆØ (if accepted in exchange for euro) are to be
recorded under this item.
Item 050 Bills eligible for refinancing
(Wechsel, refinanzierbar)
Bills held in the bankŌĆÖs portfolio that are eligible for refinancing with central banks, other than bills for
collection, are to be shown under this item.

40

 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

Bills not discounted and credited to customers, promissory notes and bills drawn by the bank and
deposited with the reporting institution (collateral bills) are not to be recorded as bills. Loans backed
by these bills are to be shown, depending on the obligor, under item HV11/061 ŌĆ£Loans and advances
to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ or item HV11/071 ŌĆ£Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs)ŌĆØ. This also applies
to instalment sales bills not discounted.
Redrafted bills may not be included in the portfolio but must be shown, depending on the obligor,
under item HV11/061 or HV11/071. Own acceptances held in portfolio do not have to be shown.
For own acceptances and promissory notes held in portfolio, see memo item HV22/239 with the same designation.

Item 052 Bills eligible for refinancing with central banks in other countries in which the reporting
bank is established
(Wechsel, refinanzierbar bei Zentralnotenbanken in anderen Niederlassungsl├żndern)
Bills that are eligible for refinancing not with the Deutsche Bundesbank but rather with central banks
in other countries in which the reporting bank is established are to be shown under this item.
For the definition of ŌĆ£countries in which the reporting bank is establishedŌĆØ, see item HV11/020 ŌĆ£Balances with central banksŌĆØ.

Item 060 Loans and advances to banks (MFIs)
(Forderungen an Banken (MFIs))
All types of loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks arising from banking transactions,
including bills accepted from banks, other than those to be recorded under item HV11/050 ŌĆ£Bills
eligible for refinancingŌĆØ or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of item HV11/080 ŌĆ£Debt
instrumentsŌĆØ, are to be shown under this item.
Item 061 Loans and advances to banks (MFIs)
(Buchforderungen an Banken (MFIs))
Loans and advances to banks also include
’éĘ claims arising from genuine repurchase transactions,
’éĘ registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities, order debt securities not forming
part of a total issue, non-negotiable order debt securities forming part of a total issue, registered
money market paper, non-negotiable bearer money market paper and non-negotiable ŌĆ£certificatesŌĆØ,
’éĘ registered participation certificates, non-negotiable bearer participation certificates and other
repayable securitised participation rights,
’éĘ claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank arising from overnight deposits, time deposits and securities
repurchase agreements, as well as balances and foreign currency balances with the central banks
of the countries in which the reporting bank is established that are not readily available at all times,
’éĘ debit balances arising in clearing accounts carried for banks (accounts which are used solely for
settling the mutual exchange of cheques, bills of exchange and credit transfers and for the on-going
settlement of similar payment transactions between banks and which are balanced at short notice)
and from securities business,
’éĘ claims bought through factoring or forfeiting,
’éĘ amounts saved under savings contracts concluded with building and loan associations (ŌĆ£home
ownership savings plansŌĆØ).
Claims

arising

from

borrowerŌĆÖs

note

transactions

(Schuldscheingesch├żfte

or

 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

Teilschuldscheingesch├żfte) are to be shown, depending on the obligor, either under this item or under
item HV11/071 ŌĆ£Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs)ŌĆØ.
Institutions with a building and loan division must also record their claims on the legally dependent
building and loan division under this item; legally dependent building and loan associations are to
show their claims on their head office.
Institutions with branches abroad and the domestic branches of foreign banks are also to show their
claims on affiliates abroad here (see ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ, footnote 1 on p. 32) (with the exceptionof
working capital supplied to foreign branches of domestic banks, see item HV11/176 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ (andŌĆ£of
whichŌĆØ sub-item HV12/188)).
Transmitted loans are to be recorded here if they are transmitted by the reporting institution not to
the ultimate borrower (non-bank) directly but to an intermediary bank which lends the funds on in its

Redemption claims arising from securities and precious metal loans are not to be shown under this
item.
For ŌĆ£sale and repurchase transactions, securities and precious metal lending transactionsŌĆØ, ŌĆ£offsetting operationsŌĆØ, ŌĆ£transmitted loansŌĆØ
and ŌĆ£syndicated transactionsŌĆØ, see ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ.
For delivery claims on precious metal accounts, see item HV11/176 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.
For ŌĆ£certificatesŌĆØ, see the note on item HV21/231 ŌĆ£Debt securities issuedŌĆØ.
For the definition of ŌĆ£countries in which the reporting bank is establishedŌĆØ, see item HV11/020 ŌĆ£Balances with central banksŌĆØ.
For ŌĆ£paper registered abroadŌĆØ, see ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ, ŌĆ£III. General reporting rules and other explanatory notesŌĆØ.

Item 062 Bills received from banks (other than those included under item 050)
(Wechsel, die von Banken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst))
Of the bills discounted without recourse, those which have been accepted from banks but are not
eligible for refinancing with central banks (item HV11/050) are to be recorded under this item.
The guidelines on item HV11/050 ŌĆ£Bills eligible for refinancingŌĆØ apply as appropriate to bills not
discounted and credited to borrowers, redrafted bills and own acceptances held in portfolio.
Item 070 Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs)
(Forderungen an Nichtbanken (Nicht-MFIs))
All types of assets (including bills received from non-banks) which constitute loans and advances to
domestic and foreign non-banks, other than bills within the meaning of item HV11/050 ŌĆ£Bills eligible
for refinancingŌĆØ or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of item HV11/080 ŌĆ£Debt instrumentsŌĆØ
are to be recorded here.
Item 071 Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs)
(Buchforderungen an Nichtbanken (Nicht-MFIs))
Loans and advances to non-banks include registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt
securities and ŌĆ£certificatesŌĆØ, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, non-negotiable
order debt securities forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable
bearer money market paper, registered participation certificates, non-negotiable bearer participation

BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

certificates and other repayable securitised participation rights. They also include claims arising from

item HV11/050 ŌĆ£Bills eligible for refinancingŌĆØ). Claims arising from borrowerŌĆÖs note transactions
(Schuldscheingesch├żfte or Teilschuldscheingesch├żfte) are to be shown, depending on the obligor,
under this item or under item HV11/061 ŌĆ£Loans and advances to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ.

Only the total amount of loans outstanding is to be recorded ŌĆō not the total amount of lending

notesŌĆØ.

Of the bills discounted without recourse, those that have been accepted from non-banks, other than

Item 079 ECB debt securities

For securities, see ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ, ŌĆ£III. General reporting rules and other explanatory notesŌĆØ.

Item 081 Money market paper (other than that included under item 040)
(Geldmarktpapiere (soweit nicht in Position 040 erfasst))
Negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper,
Euronotes, certificates of deposit, ŌĆ£bons de caisseŌĆØ and similar securitised rights), other than those
issued by public bodies and falling under item HV11/040 ŌĆ£Treasury bills, ...ŌĆØ, also are to be recorded
under this item. ECB debt securities are also to be included (and shown separately under item

BUNDESBANK

HV12/079). Stripped debt securities, i.e. both stripped bonds (principal strips) and coupon strips, are

Item 082 Bonds and notes
(Anleihen und Schuldverschreibungen)
The following rights, if they are negotiable, are to be recorded under bonds and debt securities: fixed

recorded here.
Bonds and debt securities include debt securities issued by central government (including the twoyear Federal Treasury notes (Bundesschatzanweisungen (Sch├żtze)), state government (including
their coupon-bearing Treasury notes (Schatzanweisungen) and those issued as zero coupon bonds),

Negotiable ŌĆ£certificatesŌĆØ (such as structured bonds, participation certificates, index-linked bonds and
the like; see explanatory notes on item HV21/231 ŌĆ£Debt securities issuedŌĆØ) must also be shown under
this item if they are debt securities pursuant to Section 793 of the German Civil Code (B├╝rgerliches
Gesetzbuch).
Registered debt securities, savings bonds and similar assets (as far as non-negotiable bearer paper), see item HV11/061
ŌĆ£Loans and advances to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ or item HV11/071 ŌĆ£Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs)ŌĆØ.
For accrued interest, see ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ, ŌĆ£III. General reporting rules and other explanatory notesŌĆØ.

Repurchased subordinated and non-subordinated negotiable own debt securities (including bearer
money market paper) are to be reported here; holdings of non-negotiable own debt securities are to
be deducted from the liabilities items HV21/231 ŌĆ£Debt securities issuedŌĆØ, HV21/232 ŌĆ£Money market
paper issuedŌĆØ or HV21/280 (in the case of subordinated liabilities) at the value at which they are
carried on the liability side.
Holdings of debt securities issued by the institutionŌĆÖs subsidiaries abroad (see ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ,
footnote 1 on p. 32) and carried on their books as a liability must be reported not here, but under item
HV11/081 ŌĆ£Money market paperŌĆØ or HV11/082 ŌĆ£Bonds and notesŌĆØ and carried over into line 134 of
Annex E1 Securities.
Item 084 Floating rate notes
(Variabel verzinsliche Anleihen)
The floating rate notes included under item HV11/082 ŌĆ£Bonds and notesŌĆØ are to be recorded here;
they also include ŌĆ£floaters with a fixed rate componentŌĆØ and similar debt securities whose interest rate
has not been fixed in advance for their entire period up to maturity. Floating rate notes denominated
in foreign currency are, in addition, to be recorded under item HV12/086 ŌĆ£Foreign currency bondsŌĆØ.
Debt securities with a fixed interest rate over their entire term or interest payments determined by a
pre-set interest rate table (pro rata bonds, step-rate bonds) are deemed to be fixed income
instruments and are not to be included either under this item or in Annex F1 line 101.
Item 085 Zero coupon bonds
(Null-Kupon-Anleihen)
Securities recorded under item HV11/082 ŌĆ£Bonds and notesŌĆØ and on which interest is not paid during
the maturity period but only on redemption (i.e. discount and accrued interest bonds) are to be shown
here. Zero coupon bonds denominated in foreign currency are, in addition, to be recorded under item
HV12/086 ŌĆ£Foreign currency bondsŌĆØ. The book value (purchase price plus accrued interest) is to be
stated.
This item is reserved for standard paper, i.e. bonds that have been designed from the outset as zero
coupon bonds. Therefore, stripped bonds ŌĆō both principal strips and coupon strips ŌĆō are not to be
included here, irrespective of their economic nature as zero coupon bonds.
Item 086 Foreign currency bonds
(Fremdw├żhrungsanleihen)
Bonds not denominated in euro, ECU, Deutsche Mark or the legacy currencies of the other euro area
Member States are regarded as foreign currency bonds. Foreign currency floating rate notes (item
HV12/084) and foreign currency zero coupon bonds (item HV12/085) are also to be shown here.
Item 090 Shares and other variable yield securities
(Aktien und andere nicht festverzinsliche Wertpapiere)
Shares, other than those which are to be recorded under item HV11/100 ŌĆ£Participating interests and
amounts paid up on cooperative society sharesŌĆØ or item HV11/110 ŌĆ£Shares in affiliated enterprisesŌĆØ,
are to be shown here, as well as temporary stock certificates, subscription rights, mutual fund shares
(including property fund certificates issued by open-ended real estate funds), warrants, dividend

45

 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK
Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

coupons, negotiable bearer or order participation certificates and other variable yield securities
provided that they are listed on a stock exchange. Dividend coupons received before maturities are
also to be included here.
Repurchased options on own securities are to be deducted from liability item HV21/234 ŌĆ£Other
securitised liabilitiesŌĆØ.
For own shares, see item HV11/160 ŌĆ£Own sharesŌĆØ.

Item 100 Participating interests and amounts paid up on cooperative society shares
(Beteiligungen und Gesch├żftsguthaben bei Genossenschaften)
Ownership interests not evidenced by securities (shares in private limited companies, participating
interests held as a personally liable partner in general partnerships, limited partnerships, limited
companies with one or more general partners (Kommanditgesellschaften auf Aktien, KGaA), shares
held by limited partners, participating interests of silent partners which are qualified as balance sheet
equity) are also to be included under this item.
Shares in incorporated enterprises whose nominal values in the aggregate exceed one-fifth of the
nominal capital of the enterprise are, in cases of doubt, deemed to be participating interests.
For participating interests in affiliated enterprises, see item HV11/110 ŌĆ£Shares in affiliated enterprisesŌĆØ.

Item 101 Nominal value of participating interests in domestic banks (MFIs) (including amounts
paid up on cooperative society shares) and of shares in affiliated domestic banks (MFIs)
(Nennbetrag der Beteiligungen an inl├żndischen Banken (MFIs) (einschlie├¤lich
Gesch├żftsguthaben bei Kreditgenossenschaften) und der Anteile an verbundenen
inl├żndischen Banken (MFIs))
The total nominal value of the participating interests or shares in affiliated domestic banks recorded
under items HV11/100 and HV11/110 at the balance sheet value is to be shown here (to be validated
using E2.110/07). In the case of no-par stock, the accounting par value (to be calculated as issued
capital divided by the volume of shares issued) is to be used.
Item 110 Shares in affiliated enterprises
(Anteile an verbundenen Unternehmen)
Shares in affiliated enterprises, including ownership interests not evidenced by securities, are to be
shown here, even if they constitute participating interests.
Item 120 Fiduciary assets
(Treuhandverm├Čgen)
Assets which the reporting institution administers in its own name but on behalf of third parties are to
be recorded here. The amounts shown under items HV11/120 and HV21/240 must tally.
Item 121 Fiduciary loans
(Treuhandkredite)
For the recording of fiduciary loans, see ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ, ŌĆ£III. General reporting rules and other explanatory
notesŌĆØ.For loans administered in the name and on behalf of third parties, see item HV22/420 ŌĆ£Administered loansŌĆØ.

Item 122 Securities managed on a fiduciary basis

(Treuh├żnderisch gehaltene Wertpapiere)
Shares and other variable yield securities, as well as negotiable debt instruments, held in the bankŌĆÖs
own name but on behalf of third parties, are to be recorded here. Non-negotiable debt instruments
and other fixed income securities are to be included under item HV11/123 ŌĆ£Other fiduciary assetsŌĆØ.
For the purpose of these guidelines, securities kept in safe custody for customers as part of safe
custody business are not deemed to be securities managed on a fiduciary basis.
Item 123 Other fiduciary assets
(Sonstiges Treuhandverm├Čgen)
Examples of the assets to be included under this item are participating interests and land and
buildings managed on a fiduciary basis.
Item 130 Equalisation claims on general government (including debt securities resulting from
the conversion of equalisation claims)
(Ausgleichsforderungen gegen die ├Čffentliche Hand (einschlie├¤lich Schuldverschreibungen
aus dem Umtausch von Ausgleichsforderungen))
Equalisation claims on the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund are to be recorded under this
item. Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund, which were created as
a result of the conversion of equalisation claims on the Fund, are also to be included here, irrespective
of whether the reporting institution obtained the debt securities as a result of converting its own
equalisation claims or bought them from another institution or a foreign trade enterprise.
Item 131 Debt securities resulting from the conversion of equalisation claims
(Schuldverschreibungen aus dem Umtausch von Ausgleichsforderungen)
Debt securities resulting from the conversion of equalisation claims included under item HV11/130
are to be shown separately here.
Item 140 Tangible assets
(Sachanlagen)
These include land and buildings and furniture and equipment, provided that they constitute fixed
assets. Intangible assets and current assets (e.g. real estate acquired as a safeguard against loan
losses and held by the reporting institution for a period of not more than five years) are not to be
shown here but under item HV11/176 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.
See ŌĆ£of whichŌĆØ sub-item HV12/141.

Item 141 of which: Real estate holdings
(darunter: Immobilienbest├żnde)
The real estate contained in item HV11/140, i.e. dwellings, other buildings and structures (both
existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents should be shown here;
this includes real estate for own use.
See item HV11/140.

    18ŌåÆfinancial institutions (MFIs) and non-MFI credit institutions
    19ŌåÆData collection scope
    20ŌåÆThe monthly balance sheet statistics (BISTA) represent the most comprehensive statistical survey
    21ŌåÆof the banking industry in Germany and are at the core of the banking statistics reporting system.
    22ŌåÆData are collected on the assets and liabilities of domestic banks (MFIs) and non-MFI credit
    23ŌåÆinstitutions, for the part of the institution located in Germany (domestic part), based on their books
    24ŌåÆat the end of the month. MFIs report their balance sheet and additional annexes providing
    25ŌåÆanalyticallyimportant breakdowns of balance sheet items by debtor and creditor type, term and
    26ŌåÆsector.
    27ŌåÆPursuant to Section 4 of the German Financial and Internal Capital Adequacy Information
    28ŌåÆRegulation (Verordnung zur Einreichung von Finanz- und Risikotragf├żhigkeitsinformationen,
    29ŌåÆFinaRisikoV), data reported to BISTA also serve as prudential financial information (statement of
    30ŌåÆassets and liabilities).
    31ŌåÆAn overview of the reporting templates to be submitted by reporting agents (1. banks (MFIs)
    32ŌåÆ(including electronic money institutions (MFIs)), 2. building and loan associations (MFIs) and 3.
    33ŌåÆnon-MFI credit institutions) can be found in the section ŌĆ£List of reports from banks (MFIs) and nonMFI credit institutions for the monthly balance sheet statisticsŌĆØ.
    34ŌåÆSee ŌĆ£List of reports from banks (MFIs) and non-MFI credit institutions for the monthly balance sheet statisticsŌĆØ.

    49ŌåÆ(Kassenbestand)
    50ŌåÆLegal tender, including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps are to be
    51ŌåÆshown under this item. Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or the legacy currencies of the
    52ŌåÆother euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also to be reported here.
    53ŌåÆCommemorative coins bought at a price higher than the face value, gold coins (even if they are legal
    54ŌåÆtender) and gold bullion are to be shown under item HV11/176 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.
    55ŌåÆItem 011 Domestic legal tender
    56ŌåÆ(Inl├żndische gesetzliche Zahlungsmittel)
    57ŌåÆOnly euro banknotes and coins and legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or the legacy
    58ŌåÆcurrencies of the other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro as reported under
    59ŌåÆŌĆ£cash in handŌĆØ are to be shown under this item.
    60ŌåÆItem 020 Balances with central banks
    61ŌåÆ(Guthaben bei Zentralnotenbanken)
    62ŌåÆThis item may include only those balances that are readily available at all times, including foreign
    63ŌåÆcurrency overnight balances with the central banks of the countries in which the reporting bank is
    64ŌåÆestablished. Other balances, such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit
    65ŌåÆfacility, as well as claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank arising from sale and repurchase transactions
    66ŌåÆand time deposits are to be shown under item HV11/061 ŌĆ£Loans and advances to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ.
    67ŌåÆLoans from central banks, e.g. overnight loans taken up through the Bundesbank marginal lending
    68ŌåÆfacility, or other loans and advances repayable on demand are not to be deducted from the balances
    69ŌåÆbut shown under item HV21/210 ŌĆ£Liabilities to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ. Any credit balances recorded in the
    70ŌåÆBundesbank giro account are to be shown under item HV21/326 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.
    71ŌåÆŌĆ£Countries in which the reporting bank is establishedŌĆØ are all countries ŌĆō including the country in which the head office of the
    72ŌåÆreporting institution is established ŌĆō in which the institution conducts banking business, offers services or is represented for
    73ŌåÆother reasons, irrespective of the form (office, branch, representative office) in which it operates in the country concerned.

assets_end = text.find("II. Liabilities (HV21 and HV22)")

# Find liabilities section
liab_start = text.find("II. Liabilities (HV21 and HV22)")
liab_end = len(text)

# For HV11/HV12 items, look for references in the text

# For HV21/HV22 items

import re

with open('/tmp/bista_full.txt', 'r') as f:

   118ŌåÆHV21_342,Sureties and guarantee agreements,Verbindlichkeiten aus B├╝rgschaften und Gew├żhrleistungsvertr├żgen,"Performance bonds, guarantee obligations, banking book credit derivatives (CDS, total return swaps), comfort letters, irrevocable letters of credit. Sub-item of HV21/340."
   119ŌåÆHV21_343,Assets pledged as collateral on behalf of third parties,Haftung aus der Bestellung von Sicherheiten f├╝r fremde Verbindlichkeiten,Assets pledged as collateral at book value for third-party liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/340.
   120ŌåÆHV21_350,Bills sent for collection before maturity,Aus dem Wechselbestand vor Verfall zum Einzug versandte Wechsel,"Bills purchased, removed from bill portfolio before maturity and sent for collection."
   121ŌåÆHV21_360,Volume of business,Gesch├żftsvolumen,"Balance sheet total plus HV21/341, HV21/350."
   122ŌåÆHV21_370,Commitments from sales with option to repurchase,R├╝cknahmeverpflichtungen aus unechten Pensionsgesch├żften,Commitments to repurchase assets sold under option-to-repurchase agreements (Items 371ŌĆō373).
   123ŌåÆHV21_380,Placing and underwriting commitments,Platzierungs- und ├£bernahmeverpflichtungen,Commitments from guaranteeing placing or underwriting of financial instruments on a revolving basis. Back-up lines and stand-by facilities. Net of amounts actually drawn.
   124ŌåÆHV21_390,Irrevocable lending commitments,Unwiderrufliche Kreditzusagen,"All irrevocable commitments that could give rise to credit risk: formal commitments to grant loans, purchase securities, provide guarantees, forward deposits, placing and underwriting for capital market paper. Net of amounts drawn."
   125ŌåÆHV21_400,Funds raised against collateral,Verbindlichkeiten gegen Sicherheitsleistung,Borrowing against collateral from HV21/210 and HV21/222 including open market loans with Bundesbank and genuine repurchase transactions (Items 401ŌĆō402).
   126ŌåÆHV21_410,Interest and currency swaps,Zins- und W├żhrungsswaps,Principal amounts of financial swaps where interest and/or currency amounts are exchanged. Includes cross-currency interest rate swaps and forward swaps. Fiduciary transactions and non-recourse transactions also included (Items 411ŌĆō413).
   127ŌåÆHV21_420,Administered loans,Verwaltungskredite,Loans administered by the bank in its own name on behalf of third parties. See HV12/215; see Annex Q1.
   128ŌåÆHV22_219,Registered debt securities to banks,Namensschuldverschreibungen an Banken,Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to banks within HV21/210. Savings bonds and small-denomination registered securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/210.
   129ŌåÆHV22_229,Registered debt securities to non-banks,Namensschuldverschreibungen an Nichtbanken,Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to non-banks within HV21/222. Savings bonds and small-denomination securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/222.
   130ŌåÆHV22_239,Memo ŌĆö own acceptances and promissory notes held in portfolio,nachrichtlich Eigener Bestand an eigenen Akzepten und Solawechseln,Pledged and own acceptances and promissory notes held in the bank's portfolio and still unpaid. Memo item.
   131ŌåÆHV22_284,Subordinated non-negotiable debt securities denominated in euro,Nachrangig begebene nicht b├Črsenf├żhige Schuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV21/282 denominated in euro.
   132ŌåÆHV22_285,Subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro,Nachrangig begebene Namensschuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV21/280 subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro.
   133ŌåÆHV22_295,Additional regulatory tier 1 instruments,Instrumente des zus├żtzlichen aufsichtsrechtlichen Kernkapitals,Additional tier 1 instruments that predominantly have attributes of participation rights rather than subordinated liabilities. Shown in HV21/290 and additionally here.
   134ŌåÆHV22_335,Option prices received and margin payments (liabilities),Erhaltene Optionspreise und Marginzahlungen,Option premiums received and variation margins for non-trading-portfolio derivatives; initial margins for all unsettled derivatives. Sub-item of HV21/326.
   135ŌåÆHV22_336,Interest accrued on liabilities,Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Verbindlichkeiten,Calculated and booked accrued interest on liabilities. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV22/507. Sub-item of HV21/326.
   136ŌåÆHV22_337,Interest accrued on securities (liabilities side),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Wertpapiere Passiva,Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities on liabilities side. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV22/508. Sub-item of HV21/326.
   137ŌåÆHV22_338,Deferred income,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten Passiva HV22,Income received before reporting date but attributable to future period. Sub-item of HV21/326.
   138ŌåÆHV22_345,Interest accrued on trading portfolio derivatives (liabilities),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands Passiva,Calculated and booked accrued interest on trading portfolio derivatives. See HV22/505.
   139ŌåÆHV22_431,Retirement provisions per Altersverm├Čgensgesetz,Altersvorsorgerverm├Čgen nach dem AVmG,Retirement provisions (saver contributions) and credited government allowances per the German Retirement Pension Act. Sub-item within savings deposits.
   140ŌåÆHV22_432,Subordinated debt securities with maturities up to two years,Nachrangig begebene Schuldverschreibungen mit Laufzeit bis zwei Jahre einschlie├¤lich,Subordinated debt securities under HV21/280 with original maturities of up to and including two years.
   141ŌåÆHV22_441,Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to non-banks ŌĆö maturity up to two years,Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten gegen├╝ber Nichtbanken Laufzeit bis zwei Jahre,Unsecuritised subordinated liabilities to non-banks with agreed maturities or periods of notice up to and including two years under HV21/280. Sub-items: HV22/442 and HV22/443.
   142ŌåÆHV22_442,Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to domestic non-banks and euro-area non-banks ŌĆö maturity up to two years,Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten Nichtbanken Inland und Euroraum bis zwei Jahre,Sub-item of HV22/441: domestic non-banks and non-banks in other euro-area Member States.
   143ŌåÆHV22_443,Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to non-MFI credit institutions ŌĆö maturity up to two years,Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten gegen├╝ber mindestreservepflichtigen Nicht-MFI-Kreditinstituten bis zwei Jahre,Sub-item of HV22/441: non-MFI credit institutions subject to minimum reserve requirements in Germany or other euro-area Member States.
   144ŌåÆHV22_472,Number of employees (full-time equivalents),Anzahl der Besch├żftigten nach Vollzeitbesch├żftigten,Average number of employees in full-time equivalents at the reporting institution in the reference year (calendar year preceding the reporting date).
   145ŌåÆHV22_473,Number of employees (headcount),Anzahl der Besch├żftigten nach K├Čpfen,Average number of employees (headcount) at the reporting institution in the reference year.
   146ŌåÆHV22_480,Trading portfolio (liabilities memo),Handelsbestand Passiva nachrichtlich,"Memo: trading portfolio components in liability items HV21/210, HV21/220 and HV21/230."
   147ŌåÆHV22_501,Amounts loaded on to prepaid cards denominated in euro,Geldkarten-Aufladungsgegenwerte auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV22/329: amounts loaded onto prepaid cards denominated in euro.
   148ŌåÆHV22_502,Loaded network money amounts,Netzgeld-Aufladungsgegenwerte,"Loaded electronic payment units included in HV21/326, not recorded under HV22/329."
   149ŌåÆHV22_505,Derivative financial instruments in trading portfolio (negative value),Derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands negativ,Trading portfolio derivatives with negative fair value. Counterpart to HV12/186 on assets side. Accrued interest reported separately under HV22/345.
   150ŌåÆHV22_506,Currency adjustment item (liabilities),W├żhrungsausgleichsposten Passiva,Differences from converting foreign currency liabilities into euro at reporting date exchange rate.
   151ŌåÆHV22_507,Negative interest accrued on liabilities,Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Verbindlichkeiten,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on liabilities. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV22/336.
   152ŌåÆHV22_508,Negative interest accrued on securities (liabilities),Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Wertpapier Passiva,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on securities on liabilities side. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV22/337.
   153ŌåÆHV22_509,Advance allocation to reserves from generated profits,Vorwegzuf├╝hrung zu den R├╝cklagen aus erwirtschafteten ├£bersch├╝ssen,Advance allocations to reserves from generated profits shown in other liabilities until adoption of annual accounts.
   154ŌåÆHV22_510,Net profit of previous financial year and profit brought forward,Netto├╝berschuss des vorangegangenen Gesch├żftsjahres und Gewinnvortrag,"Net profit from previous financial year (income exceeded expenditure) plus any profit brought forward, not yet included in other HV21 items."
   155ŌåÆHV22_511,Derivative financial instruments excluded from trading portfolio (liabilities),Derivative Finanzinstrumente nicht Handelsbestand Passiva,Negative amounts for non-trading-portfolio derivatives (counterpart to HV12/197 positive amounts). Reported as positive amounts.
   156ŌåÆHV22_512,Covered bonds eligible for own use (Article 138 bonds),F├╝r den Eigengebrauch zugelassene gedeckte Schuldverschreibungen gem├ż├¤ Artikel 138 EZB,Covered bonds retained at issuance for own holdings (Article 138 of Guideline (EU) 2015/510). Shown at internal accounting valuation (in doubt: nominal value). Memo off-balance item for commercial law purposes.
   157ŌåÆHV22_515,Reserves ŌĆö share attributable to revenue reserves,R├╝cklagen Anteil auf Gewinnr├╝cklage einschlie├¤lich Vorwegzuf├╝hrungen,Sub-item of HV21/312: reserve fund (Sicherheitsr├╝cklagen) of savings banks and revenue reserves of credit cooperatives. See HV21/312 and HV22/521.
   158ŌåÆHV22_521,Reserves ŌĆö share attributable to capital reserves and other components,R├╝cklagen Anteil auf Kapitalr├╝cklage und sonstige R├╝cklagenanteile,Sub-item of HV21/312: capital reserves and other reserve components not attributable to revenue reserves.
   159ŌåÆHV22_523,Notional cash pooling,Fiktives Cash-Pooling FCP,Annual metric (February BISTA reporting date) for threshold analysis determining whether reporting templates M1/M1B/M2 must be submitted. Categories 1ŌĆō4 based on threshold S500 = Ōé¼500 million.

HV21_224,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/280),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/280),Syndicated loans raised and included in HV21/280 Subordinated liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/280.
HV21_225,Syndicated loans raised (sub of HV21/330),Aufgenommene Konsortialkredite (HV21/330),Syndicated loans raised and included in HV21/330 Total liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/330.
HV21_230,Securitised liabilities,Verbriefte Verbindlichkeiten,"Both debt securities and debts for which non-registered transferable certificates have been issued are to be included irrespective of whether they are negotiable or not (Item 230). Subordinated securitised liabilities ŌåÆ HV21/280. Repurchased non-negotiable own debt securities deducted at the value at which they are carried on the liability side. Includes: debt securities in issue (Item 231) ŌĆö bearer debt securities and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, irrespective of negotiability, including structured bonds, share certificates, index-linked bonds; money market paper in issue (Item 232) ŌĆö only bearer or order paper forming part of a total issue with original maturity up to and including one year (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse); own acceptances and promissory notes outstanding (Item 233) ŌĆö own acceptances in respect of which the institution is the first party liable and the supply of own acceptances under acceptance credits; and other securitised liabilities (Item 234) ŌĆö warrants evidenced by securities not bearer debt securities under Section 793 German Civil Code."
HV21_231,Debt securities in issue,Begebene Schuldverschreibungen,"Bearer debt securities and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, irrespective of negotiability. Includes structured bonds, share certificates, index-linked bonds. Zero coupon bonds at issue value. Sub-item of HV21/230."
HV21_232,Money market paper in issue,Begebene Geldmarktpapiere,"Bearer or order paper forming part of a total issue with original maturity Ōēż 1 year (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse). Sub-item of HV21/230."
HV21_233,Own acceptances and promissory notes outstanding,Eigene Akzepte und Solawechsel im Umlauf,Own acceptances where institution is first party liable and supply under acceptance credits. Sub-item of HV21/230.
HV21_234,Other securitised liabilities,Sonstige verbriefte Verbindlichkeiten,Warrants evidenced by securities that are not bearer debt securities under Section 793 BGB. Sub-item of HV21/230.
HV21_240,Trust liabilities,Treuhandverbindlichkeiten,Liabilities which the reporting institution has incurred in its own name but on behalf of third parties (Item 240). The amounts shown under HV21/240 and HV11/120 must tally. Includes: fiduciary loans (Item 241) ŌĆö amounts shown under HV21/210 or HV21/222 relating to banks or non-banks respectively to be classified here by creditor; funds for fiduciary loans not yet transmitted by the reporting date ŌåÆ column 01 of Annex C1 under overnight money; securities issued on a fiduciary basis (Item 242) ŌĆö debt securities issued in the bank's own name on behalf of third parties where the institution's liability to creditors is confined to due administration of proceeds and transfer of interest and redemption payments received; and other fiduciary liabilities (Item 243).
HV21_241,Fiduciary loans (liabilities),Treuhandkredite Passiva,Amounts from HV21/210 or HV21/222 relating to banks or non-banks respectively classified by creditor. Sub-item of HV21/240.
HV21_242,Securities issued on a fiduciary basis,Treuh├żnderisch begebene Wertpapiere,Debt securities issued in bank's own name on behalf of third parties where institution's liability is confined to due administration of proceeds. Sub-item of HV21/240.
HV21_243,Other fiduciary liabilities,Sonstige Treuhandverbindlichkeiten,Other liabilities incurred in own name on behalf of third parties. Sub-item of HV21/240.
HV21_250,Other liabilities,Sonstige Verbindlichkeiten,"Only those liabilities which cannot or cannot yet be assigned to another item are to be included (Item 320). For details see Items 321 to 326. Comprises: accrued interest on zero coupon bonds (Item 321); liability item from refinancing of lease receivables (Item 322); liabilities from transactions in goods and from trade credits obtained (Item 323); debit balance on items in the process of settlement (Item 324); debit balance on income and expenditure accounts (Item 325); and a broad residual catch-all (Item 326) including: undisclosed contingency reserves under Section 340f(1) HGB; accrued interest on liability items and on securities; amounts from traveller's cheques issued; option prices received and initial and variation margins received for outstanding financial futures contracts; accounting position credit balances on the Bundesbank giro account; amounts loaded onto prepaid cards; loaded network money amounts; liabilities not from core banking business (e.g. wage taxes, social security contributions, not yet paid dividends and profit shares); delivery obligations from precious metal accounts; deferred tax liabilities under Section 274 HGB; and derivative financial instruments in the trading portfolio with negative fair values ŌĆö shown separately under HV22/505."
HV21_260,Deferred income,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten Passiva,"Deferred income (Item 338): income received before the reporting date but attributable to a future accounting period, and other deferred income. Calculated and booked accrued interest on liabilities is shown under Item 336 (Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Verbindlichkeiten); any negative interest is to be reported not here but under HV22/507. Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities stated on the liabilities side is shown under Item 337 (Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Wertpapiere); any negative interest is to be reported not here but under HV22/508."
HV21_270,Provisions for liabilities and charges,Rueckstellungen,"Provisions for liabilities and charges (Item 260): includes provisions for contingent liabilities and for undrawn irrevocable credit commitments; value adjustments deriving from recourse claims arising from items HV21/341 to HV21/343; value adjustments deriving from non-capitalised assets sold with an option to repurchase in respect of which repurchase commitments have been shown under HV21/370. Notwithstanding Section 24 of the German Accounting Regulation for Credit Institutions, contingent liabilities arising from the endorsement of rediscounted bills (item HV21/341) should not be shown net of value adjustments. Bonus payments due on the expiry of current saving contracts should also be shown here even if premature withdrawal of amounts saved is not permitted under the terms of the contract."
HV21_280,Tax liabilities,Steuerverbindlichkeiten,"Current tax liabilities and deferred tax liabilities. Under the BISTA guidelines, deferred tax liabilities within the meaning of Section 274 of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch) are included in Item 326 (Others) as point 21. Current tax liabilities arising from corporate income tax (K├Črperschaftsteuer), solidarity surcharge and trade tax (Gewerbesteuer) are shown as provisions under Item 260 (R├╝ckstellungen) sub-item b (Steuerr├╝ckstellungen). This item captures the combined tax liability position reported on the BISTA balance sheet form."
HV21_281,Subordinated negotiable debt securities,Nachrangig begebene b├Črsenf├żhige Schuldverschreibungen,Negotiable subordinated debt securities. Sub-item of HV21/280.
HV21_282,Subordinated non-negotiable debt securities,Nachrangig begebene nicht b├Črsenf├żhige Schuldverschreibungen,Non-negotiable subordinated debt securities. Sub-item of HV21/280. Sub-item: HV22/284 denominated in euro.
HV21_290,Capital represented by participation rights,Genussrechtskapital,Capital represented by participation rights or comparable equity-nature capital. Includes certificates and rights not evidenced by certificates. Repurchased own participation rights deducted. Sub-item: HV22/295.
HV21_300,Subordinated liabilities,Nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten,"All liabilities ŌĆö whether securitised or not ŌĆö which in the event of winding-up or bankruptcy may be repaid only after the claims of all other creditors have been met (Item 280). Repurchased non-negotiable own subordinated paper is to be deducted at the value at which it is carried on the liability side. Liabilities deriving from drawn, called or matured but not yet paid subordinated own debt securities are still to be shown here. Includes: subordinated negotiable debt securities (Item 281); subordinated non-negotiable debt securities (Item 282); standardised small-denomination subordinated registered debt securities (Item 327) e.g. savings bonds (Verm├Čgensbriefe) issued by the cooperative bank sector and savings bank bonds carrying such terms ŌĆö amounts reported here are to be shown in Annex A2 column 7 or Annex C2 columns 01 to 03."
HV21_301,Fund for general banking risks ŌĆö Section 340e(4) HGB amounts,Betr├żge gem├ż├¤ ┬¦ 340e Abs. 4 HGB,Amounts earmarked in the Section 340g HGB fund attributable to the special item under Section 340e(4) HGB. Sub-item of HV21/300.
HV21_302,Fund for general banking risks ŌĆö other earmarked amounts,Sonstige zweckgebundene Betr├żge,Amounts earmarked in the Section 340g HGB fund that may only be released for a specific pre-defined purpose. Sub-item of HV21/300.
HV21_310,Participation rights capital,Genussrechtskapital,"Capital represented by participation rights or comparable capital in the nature of equity (Item 290): to be shown as soon as it has been received by the reporting institution and irrespective of whether the participation rights are evidenced by securities, take some other form, or take the shape of rights not evidenced by certificates. Capital not in the nature of equity ŌåÆ HV21/230 or HV21/210 or HV21/220, or if not evidenced by securities and not repayable ŌåÆ HV21/326. Liabilities deriving from drawn, called or matured but not yet paid own capital evidenced by certificates are still to be shown here. Repurchased own participation rights are to be deducted. Additional regulatory tier 1 instruments (Item 295 ŌĆö Instrumente des zus├żtzlichen aufsichtsrechtlichen Kernkapitals) are also recorded here to the extent they predominantly have the attributes of participation rights rather than a subordinated liability."
HV21_311,Subscribed capital,Gezeichnetes Kapital,"Capital subscribed by shareholders including silent partners, endowment capital, amounts on members' shares. Foreign branches show working capital and operating surplus. Sub-item of HV21/310."
HV21_312,Reserves,R├╝cklagen,Capital and revenue reserves including the Sicherheitsr├╝cklagen of savings banks and revenue reserves of credit cooperatives. Sub-item of HV21/310.
HV21_313,Net loss of previous financial year and loss brought forward,Nettofehlbetrag des vorangegangenen Gesch├żftsjahres und Verlustvortrag,Net loss from previous financial year and any loss brought forward. Sub-item of HV21/310.
HV21_320,Fund for general banking risks,Fonds fuer allgemeine Bankrisiken,The Fund for general banking risks created pursuant to Section 340g of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch) is to be shown under this item (Item 300). The amounts earmarked in the fund pursuant to Section 340g HGB that are attributable to the special item pursuant to Section 340e(4) HGB are to be shown separately under Item 301. Other earmarked amounts (Item 302): amounts earmarked in the fund that may only be released for a specific pre-defined intended purpose are to be shown here.
HV21_321,Interest accrued on zero coupon bonds,Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Null-Kupon Anleihen,Interest accruing annually on zero coupon bonds and the difference between subsequent selling price and issue price. Sub-item of HV21/320.
HV21_322,Liability from refinancing of lease receivables,Passivposition aus der Refinanzierung von Leasingforderungen,Accrual and deferral items for banks engaging in leasing for assigning future lease receivables receipts. Sub-item of HV21/320.
HV21_323,Liabilities from transactions in goods and trade credits,Verpflichtungen aus Warengesch├żften und aufgenommenen Warenkrediten,Liabilities from transactions in goods and trade credits obtained. Sub-item of HV21/320.
HV21_324,Debit balance on items in process of settlement,Passivsaldo der schwebenden Verrechnungen,Balance on items in process of settlement if liability items exceed asset items. Sub-item of HV21/320.
HV21_325,Capital and reserves,Eigenkapital,"Capital items (Item 310) are to be shown according to the principle of reporting accounts as they stand irrespective of formal intermediate steps (preparation and adoption of annual financial statements). Any shortfall not covered by capital is also shown here preceded by a minus sign. Comprises: subscribed capital (Item 311) ŌĆö all amounts deemed to be capital subscribed by shareholders including capital contributed by silent partners, endowment capital and amounts paid up on members' shares; domestic branches of foreign banks show working capital made available to them by their foreign head office and the operating surplus left to them; reserves (Item 312) ŌĆö capital and revenue reserves including the reserve fund (Sicherheitsr├╝cklagen) of savings banks and revenue reserves of credit cooperatives; net loss of the previous financial year and loss brought forward (Item 313); net profit of the previous financial year and profit brought forward (HV22/510); advance allocation to reserves from generated profits (HV22/509); and debit balance on income and expenditure accounts (Item 325 ŌĆö Passivsaldo der Aufwands- und Ertragskonten)."
HV21_326,Other liabilities ŌĆö residual,├£brige Passiva,"Residual catch-all including undisclosed contingency reserves, accrued interest on liability items, traveller's cheques, option prices received, prepaid card amounts, deferred tax liabilities (Section 274 HGB), and trading portfolio derivatives with negative value. Sub-item of HV21/320."
HV21_327,Subordinated registered debt securities,Nachrangig begebene Namensschuldverschreibungen,Standardised small-denomination subordinated registered debt securities (e.g. savings bonds/Verm├Čgensbriefe) included in HV21/280. Sub-item of HV21/280.
HV21_329,Amounts loaded on to prepaid cards,Geldkarten-Aufladungsgegenwerte,Balance of amounts loaded onto prepaid cards on purse clearing accounts of card issuing banks within HV21/326. Sub-item of HV21/326.
HV21_330,Total liabilities,Summe der Passiva,Sum of all HV21 balance sheet liability items.
HV21_339,Undisclosed contingency reserves,Stille Vorsorgereserven,Holdings of undisclosed contingency reserves pursuant to Section 340f(1) HGB. Sub-item of HV21/326.
HV21_340,Contingent liabilities,Eventualverbindlichkeiten,Total of items HV21/341ŌĆōHV21/343.
HV21_341,Contingent liabilities from endorsement of rediscounted bills,Eventualverbindlichkeiten aus weitergegebenen abgerechneten Wechseln,Endorsement liabilities arising from rediscounted bills including bills drawn by the bank. Not shown net of value adjustments (per Section 24 RechKredV). Sub-item of HV21/340.
HV21_342,Sureties and guarantee agreements,Verbindlichkeiten aus B├╝rgschaften und Gew├żhrleistungsvertr├żgen,"Performance bonds, guarantee obligations, banking book credit derivatives (CDS, total return swaps), comfort letters, irrevocable letters of credit. Sub-item of HV21/340."
HV21_343,Assets pledged as collateral on behalf of third parties,Haftung aus der Bestellung von Sicherheiten f├╝r fremde Verbindlichkeiten,Assets pledged as collateral at book value for third-party liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/340.
HV21_350,Bills sent for collection before maturity,Aus dem Wechselbestand vor Verfall zum Einzug versandte Wechsel,"Bills purchased, removed from bill portfolio before maturity and sent for collection."
HV21_360,Volume of business,Gesch├żftsvolumen,"Balance sheet total plus HV21/341, HV21/350."
HV21_370,Commitments from sales with option to repurchase,R├╝cknahmeverpflichtungen aus unechten Pensionsgesch├żften,Commitments to repurchase assets sold under option-to-repurchase agreements (Items 371ŌĆō373).
HV21_380,Placing and underwriting commitments,Platzierungs- und ├£bernahmeverpflichtungen,Commitments from guaranteeing placing or underwriting of financial instruments on a revolving basis. Back-up lines and stand-by facilities. Net of amounts actually drawn.
HV21_390,Irrevocable lending commitments,Unwiderrufliche Kreditzusagen,"All irrevocable commitments that could give rise to credit risk: formal commitments to grant loans, purchase securities, provide guarantees, forward deposits, placing and underwriting for capital market paper. Net of amounts drawn."
HV21_400,Funds raised against collateral,Verbindlichkeiten gegen Sicherheitsleistung,Borrowing against collateral from HV21/210 and HV21/222 including open market loans with Bundesbank and genuine repurchase transactions (Items 401ŌĆō402).
HV21_410,Interest and currency swaps,Zins- und W├żhrungsswaps,Principal amounts of financial swaps where interest and/or currency amounts are exchanged. Includes cross-currency interest rate swaps and forward swaps. Fiduciary transactions and non-recourse transactions also included (Items 411ŌĆō413).
HV21_420,Administered loans,Verwaltungskredite,Loans administered by the bank in its own name on behalf of third parties. See HV12/215; see Annex Q1.
HV22_219,Registered debt securities to banks,Namensschuldverschreibungen an Banken,Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to banks within HV21/210. Savings bonds and small-denomination registered securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/210.
HV22_229,Registered debt securities to non-banks,Namensschuldverschreibungen an Nichtbanken,Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to non-banks within HV21/222. Savings bonds and small-denomination securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/222.
HV22_239,Memo ŌĆö own acceptances and promissory notes held in portfolio,nachrichtlich Eigener Bestand an eigenen Akzepten und Solawechseln,Pledged and own acceptances and promissory notes held in the bank's portfolio and still unpaid. Memo item.
HV22_284,Subordinated non-negotiable debt securities denominated in euro,Nachrangig begebene nicht b├Črsenf├żhige Schuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV21/282 denominated in euro.
HV22_285,Subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro,Nachrangig begebene Namensschuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV21/280 subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro.

PDF="/home/perni/.claude/projects/-home-perni-clexp/cb4c6cb1-15c5-4745-a8f4-d21a078d2929/tool-results/webfetch-1774464467892-aq79rr.pdf"
python3 - <<'EOF'
import fitz

pdf_path = "/home/perni/.claude/projects/-home-perni-clexp/cb4c6cb1-15c5-4745-a8f4-d21a078d2929/tool-results/webfetch-1774464467892-aq79rr.pdf"
doc = fitz.open(pdf_path)
print(f"Pages: {doc.page_count}")

# Extract text with formatting info from first few pages to understand structure
for page_num in range(min(5, doc.page_count)):
    page = doc[page_num]
    blocks = page.get_text("dict")["blocks"]
    for block in blocks:
        if "lines" in block:
            for line in block["lines"]:
                for span in line["spans"]:
                    text = span["text"].strip()
                    if text:
                        flags = span["flags"]
                        is_bold = bool(flags & 2**4)  # bold flag
                        size = span["size"]
                        print(f"P{page_num+1} | bold={is_bold} | size={size:.1f} | {text[:120]}")
EOF

python3 - <<'EOF'
import fitz
import re

pdf_path = "/home/perni/.claude/projects/-home-perni-clexp/cb4c6cb1-15c5-4745-a8f4-d21a078d2929/tool-results/webfetch-1774464467892-aq79rr.pdf"
doc = fitz.open(pdf_path)

# Collect all bold item headers (bold, size ~10, starting with "Item")
bold_item_headers = []

for page_num in range(doc.page_count):
    page = doc[page_num]
    blocks = page.get_text("dict")["blocks"]
    for block in blocks:
        if "lines" in block:
            for line in block["lines"]:
                spans = line["spans"]
                for span in spans:
                    text = span["text"].strip()
                    flags = span["flags"]
                    is_bold = bool(flags & 2**4)
                    size = span["size"]
                    if is_bold and size >= 9.5 and size <= 11 and text.startswith("Item"):
                        bold_item_headers.append((page_num + 1, text))

# Print deduplicated list of bold item headers
seen = set()
for page, text in bold_item_headers:
    key = text[:30]
    if key not in seen:
        seen.add(key)
        print(f"P{page:03d} | {text}")
EOF

import fitz
import re

pdf_path = "/home/perni/.claude/projects/-home-perni-clexp/cb4c6cb1-15c5-4745-a8f4-d21a078d2929/tool-results/webfetch-1774464467892-aq79rr.pdf"

# Get all item numbers that appear as bold headers
all_bold_nums = set()
for page_num in range(doc.page_count):
    page = doc[page_num]
    blocks = page.get_text("dict")["blocks"]
    for block in blocks:
        if "lines" in block:
            for line in block["lines"]:
                spans = line["spans"]
                line_text = ""
                is_line_bold = False
                for span in spans:
                    text = span["text"].strip()
                    flags = span["flags"]
                    is_bold = bool(flags & 2**4)
                    size = span["size"]
                    if is_bold and size >= 9.5 and size <= 11:
                        line_text += text + " "
                        is_line_bold = True
                if is_line_bold and re.search(r'Items?\s+\d+', line_text):
                    for m in re.finditer(r'\b(\d{3})\b', line_text):

DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK

                 Monthly balance sheet statistics guidelines

                                Unofficial English translation

               Only the original German version is binding.




                                                                 37
 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK

Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026




Guidelines on the monthly balance sheet statistics of monetary
financial institutions (MFIs) and non-MFI credit institutions

Data collection scope

The monthly balance sheet statistics (BISTA) represent the most comprehensive statistical survey
of the banking industry in Germany and are at the core of the banking statistics reporting system.
Data are collected on the assets and liabilities of domestic banks (MFIs) and non-MFI credit
institutions, for the part of the institution located in Germany (domestic part), based on their books
at the end of the month. MFIs report their balance sheet and additional annexes providing
analyticallyimportant breakdowns of balance sheet items by debtor and creditor type, term and
sector.
Pursuant to Section 4 of the German Financial and Internal Capital Adequacy Information
Regulation (Verordnung zur Einreichung von Finanz- und Risikotragf├żhigkeitsinformationen,
FinaRisikoV), data reported to BISTA also serve as prudential financial information (statement of
assets and liabilities).

An overview of the reporting templates to be submitted by reporting agents (1. banks (MFIs)
(including electronic money institutions (MFIs)), 2. building and loan associations (MFIs) and 3.
non-MFI credit institutions) can be found in the section ŌĆ£List of reports from banks (MFIs) and non-
MFI credit institutions for the monthly balance sheet statisticsŌĆØ.

See ŌĆ£List of reports from banks (MFIs) and non-MFI credit institutions for the monthly balance sheet statisticsŌĆØ.




                                                                                                                    38
     DEUTSCHE
    BUNDESBANK

    Banking statistics guidelines
    January 2026


    Guidelines on the individual items on the main templates
    ((HV1) and (HV2))                   1




    I. Assets (HV11 and HV12)

    Item 010 Cash in hand
             (Kassenbestand)

    Legal tender, including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps are to be
    shown under this item. Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or the legacy currencies of the
    other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also to be reported here.
    Commemorative coins bought at a price higher than the face value, gold coins (even if they are legal
    tender) and gold bullion are to be shown under item HV11/176 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.

    Item 011 Domestic legal tender
             (Inl├żndische gesetzliche Zahlungsmittel)

    Only euro banknotes and coins and legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark or the legacy
    currencies of the other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro as reported under
    ŌĆ£cash in handŌĆØ are to be shown under this item.

    Item 020 Balances with central banks
             (Guthaben bei Zentralnotenbanken)

    This item may include only those balances that are readily available at all times, including foreign
    currency overnight balances with the central banks of the countries in which the reporting bank is
    established. Other balances, such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit
    facility, as well as claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank arising from sale and repurchase transactions
    and time deposits are to be shown under item HV11/061 ŌĆ£Loans and advances to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ.

    Loans from central banks, e.g. overnight loans taken up through the Bundesbank marginal lending
    facility, or other loans and advances repayable on demand are not to be deducted from the balances
    but shown under item HV21/210 ŌĆ£Liabilities to banks (MFIs)ŌĆØ. Any credit balances recorded in the
    Bundesbank giro account are to be shown under item HV21/326 ŌĆ£OthersŌĆØ.

Item 290 Capital represented by participation rights
         (Genussrechtskapital)

Capital represented by participation rights or comparable capital in the nature of equity is to be shown
here as soon as it has been received by the reporting institution and irrespective of whether the
participation rights are evidenced by securities or in some other form or take the shape of rights not
evidenced by certificates.

Capital not in the nature of equity is not to be shown here but, depending on its terms, under item
HV21/230 or under items HV21/210 or HV21/220 or, in the case of participation rights not evidenced
by securities and not repayable, under item HV21/326.

Liabilities deriving from drawn, called or matured but not yet paid own capital evidenced by certificates
are still to be shown here. Repurchased own participation rights are to be deducted.
See item HV/22.295 ŌĆ£Additional regulatory tier 1 instrumentsŌĆØ.


Item 295 Additional regulatory tier 1 instruments
         (Instrumente des zus├żtzlichen aufsichtsrechtlichen Kernkapitals)

Reporting is based on the rules on single-entity financial statements contained in the German
Regulation on the Accounting of Credit Institutions (Verordnung ├╝ber die Rechnungslegung der
Kreditinstitute) and in the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch), provided no special
provisions were made in the following. If, based on the overall picture presented by the
circumstances, the additional regulatory tier 1 instruments predominantly have the attributes of
neither a participation right nor a subordinated liability (HV21/280), they should be recorded as capital
represented by participation rights in item HV21/290 and additionally in item HV22/295.

Item 310 Capital
         (Eigenkapital)

Capital items, including an increase or reduction in them, should be shown according to the principle
of reporting accounts as they stand and irrespective of formal intermediate steps (preparation and
adoption of annual financial statements) having been completed.

Any shortfall not covered by capital should also be shown here, preceded by a minus sign.
See ŌĆ£General guidelinesŌĆØ, III. ŌĆ£General reporting rules and other explanatory notesŌĆØ, ŌĆ£Ledger-level principleŌĆØ.



Item 311 Subscribed capital
         (Gezeichnetes Kapital)

All amounts which (irrespective of their precise designations) are deemed, in accordance with the
legal form of the bank concerned, to be capital subscribed by the shareholders (including silent
partners) or other proprietors should be shown here; capital contributed by silent partners,
endowment capital and the amounts paid up on membersŌĆÖ shares (including those of members who
are retiring from a cooperative society with effect from the reporting date) should also be included in
this item. Domestic branches of foreign banks should show the working capital made available to
them by their foreign head office and the operating surplus left to them for the purpose of
strengthening their own resources.

In the case of sole proprietorships and partnerships, private accounts, variable equity accounts and
similar accounts held by the proprietors or partners should be shown under this item only if they
exhibit the characteristics of capital; this applies even if the accounts concerned show a negative
balance. In the case of cooperative societies, the amounts actually paid up on membersŌĆÖ shares
should be shown.
For subscribed capital unpaid, see item HV11/150 with the same designation.
For the treatment of deposits by silent partners, see the notes on item HV21/290.


Item 312 Reserves
         (R├╝cklagen)

Capital and revenue reserves, including the reserve fund (Sicherheitsr├╝cklagen) of savings banks
and the revenue reserves of credit cooperatives, should be shown under this item.
See items HV22/515, HV22/521.


Item 313 Net loss of the previous financial year and loss brought forward
         (Nettofehlbetrag des vorangegangenen Gesch├żftsjahres und Verlustvortrag)

If expenditure exceeded income in the previous financial year (net loss), the part of the balance of all
income and expenditure entries of the previous financial year which, as part of work on the annual
financial statements, has not yet been included in other items of the monthly balance sheet statistics
should be shown here.
                                                                                                                  63
 DEUTSCHE
BUNDESBANK

Banking statistics guidelines
January 2026

Any loss brought forward should also be recorded under this item.
See items HV11/175, HV21/325, HV21/300, HV21/311, HV21/312, HV22/339 and HV22/510.


Item 320 Other liabilities
         (Sonstige Passiva)

Only those liabilities which cannot or cannot yet be assigned to another item are to be shown under
this item. For details, see items HV21/321 to HV21/326.



Item 321 Interest accrued on zero coupon bonds
          (Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Null-Kupon Anleihen)

content.text:
Here are the answers to each question, based on direct extraction from the PDF text:

---

**Item 221 (Spareinlagen / Savings deposits) ŌĆö bold section header in HV21?**
YES. It appears as a standalone item header: `Item 221 Savings deposits (Spareinlagen)` on approximately page 56. However, it is NOT a sub-item of Item 222 ŌĆö the document structure is the opposite: 221 and 222 are both sub-items of Item 220 (Liabilities to non-banks). Item 221 precedes Item 222 ("Other liabilities to non-banks"), not the other way around.

**Item 270 (R├╝ckstellungen / Provisions for liabilities and charges) ŌĆö bold section header in HV21?**
NO. There is no `Item 270` in the document at all. The provisions item in HV21 is **Item 260** (`Provisions for liabilities and charges / R├╝ckstellungen`). The number 270 appears only once in the entire document in a form-field reference (`HV.270/03`) in an annex about minimum reserve calculations ŌĆö it is not a balance sheet line item header.

**Items 280, 290, 300, 310, 320 ŌĆö each a separate bold header in HV21?**
YES to all five ŌĆö they each appear as separate, standalone item headers:
- Item 280 ŌĆö `Subordinated liabilities (Nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten)` (~page 61)
- Item 290 ŌĆö `Capital represented by participation rights (Genussrechtskapital)` (~page 61)
- Item 300 ŌĆö `Fund for general banking risks (Fonds f├╝r allgemeine Bankrisiken)` (~page 62)
- Item 310 ŌĆö `Capital (Eigenkapital)` (~page 62/63)
- Item 320 ŌĆö `Other liabilities (Sonstige Passiva)` (~page 63)

None of them are combined or merged.

**Item 031 or Item 021 anywhere in the document (HV11 section)?**
NO to both. Neither `Item 031` nor `Item 021` appear anywhere in the document. The HV11 (Assets) section goes from Item 010 (Cash) ŌåÆ Item 020 (Balances with central banks) ŌåÆ Item 061 (Loans to banks), with no 021 or 031 defined as named items.

HV21_210,Liabilities to banks (MFIs),Verbindlichkeiten gegenueber Kreditinstituten,"All liabilities to domestic or foreign banks and central banks arising from banking transactions, other than securitised liabilities (HV21/230) or subordinated liabilities (HV21/280) (Item 210). HV21_301,Fund for general banking risks ŌĆö Section 340e(4) HGB amounts,Betr├żge gem├ż├¤ ┬¦ 340e Abs. 4 HGB,Amounts earmarked in the Section 340g HGB fund attributable to the special item under Section 340e(4) HGB. Sub-item of HV21/300.

HV21_310,Participation rights capital,Genussrechtskapital,"Capital represented by participation rights or comparable capital in the nature of equity (Item 290): to be shown as soon as it has been received by the reporting institution and irrespective of whether the participation rights are evidenced by securities, take some other form, or take the shape of rights not evidenced by certificates.
