HV21_339,Undisclosed contingency reserves,Stille Vorsorgereserven,Holdings of undisclosed contingency reserves pursuant to Section 340f(1) HGB. Sub-item of HV21/326.
HV21_340,Contingent liabilities,Eventualverbindlichkeiten,Total of items HV21/341ŌĆōHV21/343.
HV21_341,Contingent liabilities from endorsement of rediscounted bills,Eventualverbindlichkeiten aus weitergegebenen abgerechneten Wechseln,Endorsement liabilities arising from rediscounted bills including bills drawn by the bank. Not shown net of value adjustments (per Section 24 RechKredV). Sub-item of HV21/340.
HV21_342,Sureties and guarantee agreements,Verbindlichkeiten aus B├╝rgschaften und Gew├żhrleistungsvertr├żgen,"Performance bonds, guarantee obligations, banking book credit derivatives (CDS, total return swaps), comfort letters, irrevocable letters of credit. Sub-item of HV21/340."
HV21_343,Assets pledged as collateral on behalf of third parties,Haftung aus der Bestellung von Sicherheiten f├╝r fremde Verbindlichkeiten,Assets pledged as collateral at book value for third-party liabilities. Sub-item of HV21/340.
HV21_350,Bills sent for collection before maturity,Aus dem Wechselbestand vor Verfall zum Einzug versandte Wechsel,"Bills purchased, removed from bill portfolio before maturity and sent for collection."
HV21_360,Volume of business,Gesch├żftsvolumen,"Balance sheet total plus HV21/341, HV21/350."
HV21_370,Commitments from sales with option to repurchase,R├╝cknahmeverpflichtungen aus unechten Pensionsgesch├żften,Commitments to repurchase assets sold under option-to-repurchase agreements (Items 371ŌĆō373).
HV21_380,Placing and underwriting commitments,Platzierungs- und ├£bernahmeverpflichtungen,Commitments from guaranteeing placing or underwriting of financial instruments on a revolving basis. Back-up lines and stand-by facilities. Net of amounts actually drawn.
HV21_390,Irrevocable lending commitments,Unwiderrufliche Kreditzusagen,"All irrevocable commitments that could give rise to credit risk: formal commitments to grant loans, purchase securities, provide guarantees, forward deposits, placing and underwriting for capital market paper. Net of amounts drawn."
HV21_400,Funds raised against collateral,Verbindlichkeiten gegen Sicherheitsleistung,Borrowing against collateral from HV21/210 and HV21/222 including open market loans with Bundesbank and genuine repurchase transactions (Items 401ŌĆō402).
HV21_410,Interest and currency swaps,Zins- und W├żhrungsswaps,Principal amounts of financial swaps where interest and/or currency amounts are exchanged. Includes cross-currency interest rate swaps and forward swaps. Fiduciary transactions and non-recourse transactions also included (Items 411ŌĆō413).
HV21_420,Administered loans,Verwaltungskredite,Loans administered by the bank in its own name on behalf of third parties. See HV12/215; see Annex Q1.
HV22_219,Registered debt securities to banks,Namensschuldverschreibungen an Banken,Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to banks within HV21/210. Savings bonds and small-denomination registered securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/210.
HV22_229,Registered debt securities to non-banks,Namensschuldverschreibungen an Nichtbanken,Non-standardised large-denomination registered debt securities sold to non-banks within HV21/222. Savings bonds and small-denomination securities excluded. Sub-item of HV21/222.
HV22_239,Memo ŌĆö own acceptances and promissory notes held in portfolio,nachrichtlich Eigener Bestand an eigenen Akzepten und Solawechseln,Pledged and own acceptances and promissory notes held in the bank's portfolio and still unpaid. Memo item.
HV22_284,Subordinated non-negotiable debt securities denominated in euro,Nachrangig begebene nicht b├Črsenf├żhige Schuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV21/282 denominated in euro.
HV22_285,Subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro,Nachrangig begebene Namensschuldverschreibungen auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV21/280 subordinated registered debt securities denominated in euro.
HV22_295,Additional regulatory tier 1 instruments,Instrumente des zus├żtzlichen aufsichtsrechtlichen Kernkapitals,Additional tier 1 instruments that predominantly have attributes of participation rights rather than subordinated liabilities. Shown in HV21/290 and additionally here.
HV22_335,Option prices received and margin payments (liabilities),Erhaltene Optionspreise und Marginzahlungen,Option premiums received and variation margins for non-trading-portfolio derivatives; initial margins for all unsettled derivatives. Sub-item of HV21/326.
HV22_336,Interest accrued on liabilities,Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Verbindlichkeiten,Calculated and booked accrued interest on liabilities. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV22/507. Sub-item of HV21/326.
HV22_337,Interest accrued on securities (liabilities side),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Wertpapiere Passiva,Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities on liabilities side. Negative interest ŌåÆ HV22/508. Sub-item of HV21/326.
HV22_338,Deferred income,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten Passiva HV22,Income received before reporting date but attributable to future period. Sub-item of HV21/326.
HV22_345,Interest accrued on trading portfolio derivatives (liabilities),Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands Passiva,Calculated and booked accrued interest on trading portfolio derivatives. See HV22/505.
HV22_431,Retirement provisions per Altersverm├Čgensgesetz,Altersvorsorgerverm├Čgen nach dem AVmG,Retirement provisions (saver contributions) and credited government allowances per the German Retirement Pension Act. Sub-item within savings deposits.
HV22_432,Subordinated debt securities with maturities up to two years,Nachrangig begebene Schuldverschreibungen mit Laufzeit bis zwei Jahre einschlie├¤lich,Subordinated debt securities under HV21/280 with original maturities of up to and including two years.
HV22_441,Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to non-banks ŌĆö maturity up to two years,Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten gegen├╝ber Nichtbanken Laufzeit bis zwei Jahre,Unsecuritised subordinated liabilities to non-banks with agreed maturities or periods of notice up to and including two years under HV21/280. Sub-items: HV22/442 and HV22/443.
HV22_442,Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to domestic non-banks and euro-area non-banks ŌĆö maturity up to two years,Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten Nichtbanken Inland und Euroraum bis zwei Jahre,Sub-item of HV22/441: domestic non-banks and non-banks in other euro-area Member States.
HV22_443,Subordinated non-securitised liabilities to non-MFI credit institutions ŌĆö maturity up to two years,Unverbriefte nachrangige Verbindlichkeiten gegen├╝ber mindestreservepflichtigen Nicht-MFI-Kreditinstituten bis zwei Jahre,Sub-item of HV22/441: non-MFI credit institutions subject to minimum reserve requirements in Germany or other euro-area Member States.
HV22_472,Number of employees (full-time equivalents),Anzahl der Besch├żftigten nach Vollzeitbesch├żftigten,Average number of employees in full-time equivalents at the reporting institution in the reference year (calendar year preceding the reporting date).
HV22_473,Number of employees (headcount),Anzahl der Besch├żftigten nach K├Čpfen,Average number of employees (headcount) at the reporting institution in the reference year.
HV22_480,Trading portfolio (liabilities memo),Handelsbestand Passiva nachrichtlich,"Memo: trading portfolio components in liability items HV21/210, HV21/220 and HV21/230."
HV22_501,Amounts loaded on to prepaid cards denominated in euro,Geldkarten-Aufladungsgegenwerte auf Euro lautend,Sub-item of HV22/329: amounts loaded onto prepaid cards denominated in euro.
HV22_502,Loaded network money amounts,Netzgeld-Aufladungsgegenwerte,"Loaded electronic payment units included in HV21/326, not recorded under HV22/329."
HV22_505,Derivative financial instruments in trading portfolio (negative value),Derivative Finanzinstrumente des Handelsbestands negativ,Trading portfolio derivatives with negative fair value. Counterpart to HV12/186 on assets side. Accrued interest reported separately under HV22/345.
HV22_506,Currency adjustment item (liabilities),W├żhrungsausgleichsposten Passiva,Differences from converting foreign currency liabilities into euro at reporting date exchange rate.
HV22_507,Negative interest accrued on liabilities,Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Verbindlichkeiten,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on liabilities. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV22/336.
HV22_508,Negative interest accrued on securities (liabilities),Aufgelaufene negative Zinsen auf Wertpapier Passiva,Calculated and booked accrued negative interest on securities on liabilities side. Reported as positive amounts. Counterpart to HV22/337.
HV22_509,Advance allocation to reserves from generated profits,Vorwegzuf├╝hrung zu den R├╝cklagen aus erwirtschafteten ├£bersch├╝ssen,Advance allocations to reserves from generated profits shown in other liabilities until adoption of annual accounts.
HV22_510,Net profit of previous financial year and profit brought forward,Netto├╝berschuss des vorangegangenen Gesch├żftsjahres und Gewinnvortrag,"Net profit from previous financial year (income exceeded expenditure) plus any profit brought forward, not yet included in other HV21 items."
HV22_511,Derivative financial instruments excluded from trading portfolio (liabilities),Derivative Finanzinstrumente nicht Handelsbestand Passiva,Negative amounts for non-trading-portfolio derivatives (counterpart to HV12/197 positive amounts). Reported as positive amounts.
HV22_512,Covered bonds eligible for own use (Article 138 bonds),F├╝r den Eigengebrauch zugelassene gedeckte Schuldverschreibungen gem├ż├¤ Artikel 138 EZB,Covered bonds retained at issuance for own holdings (Article 138 of Guideline (EU) 2015/510). Shown at internal accounting valuation (in doubt: nominal value). Memo off-balance item for commercial law purposes.
HV22_515,Reserves ŌĆö share attributable to revenue reserves,R├╝cklagen Anteil auf Gewinnr├╝cklage einschlie├¤lich Vorwegzuf├╝hrungen,Sub-item of HV21/312: reserve fund (Sicherheitsr├╝cklagen) of savings banks and revenue reserves of credit cooperatives. See HV21/312 and HV22/521.
HV22_521,Reserves ŌĆö share attributable to capital reserves and other components,R├╝cklagen Anteil auf Kapitalr├╝cklage und sonstige R├╝cklagenanteile,Sub-item of HV21/312: capital reserves and other reserve components not attributable to revenue reserves.
HV22_523,Notional cash pooling,Fiktives Cash-Pooling FCP,Annual metric (February BISTA reporting date) for threshold analysis determining whether reporting templates M1/M1B/M2 must be submitted. Categories 1ŌĆō4 based on threshold S500 = Ōé¼500 million.
HV22_524_526,Trading portfolio ŌĆö liabilities breakdown,Handelsbestand Passiva Aufgliederung,"Trading portfolio components in HV21/210, HV21/220 and HV21/230, recorded separately (Items 524ŌĆō526)."
HV22_624_625,Trading portfolio valued at settlement day,Handelsbestand bewertet zum Erf├╝llungsbetrag,Financial instruments in the trading portfolio also reported at repayment amounts pursuant to Section 253(1) sentence 2 HGB (Items 624ŌĆō625).

lines: HV11_010,Cash in hand,Kassenbestand,"Legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps. Deutsche Mark and legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro also reported here. Commemorative coins above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176 Others. Sub-items: HV12/011 Domestic legal tender, HV12/048 Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark."

HV11_011,Cash reserves,Barreserve,"Cash in hand (Item 010): legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps; Deutsche Mark and legacy currencies of other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also reported here; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176. Balances with central banks (Item 020): only those balances readily available at all times including foreign currency overnight balances with the central banks of all countries in which the reporting institution is established; other balances such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from sale and repurchase transactions, and time deposits are to be shown under HV11/061."

HV11_020,Balances with central banks,Guthaben bei Zentralnotenbanken,"Only balances readily available at all times, including foreign currency overnight balances with central banks of all countries in which the reporting bank is established. Other balances (overnight deposits at Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from repurchase transactions, time deposits) ŌåÆ HV11/061. Sub-item of HV11/011 Barreserve aggregate."

-HV11_021,Treasury bills,Schatzwechsel und unverzinsliche Schatzanweisungen,"Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar debt instruments issued by public bodies that have been discounted and are eligible for refinancing with the central banks of the countries in which the reporting bank is established, with original maturity not exceeding one year (Item 040). Debt instruments of public bodies failing these conditions are to be shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) or HV11/082 (Bonds and notes) if they are negotiable, and under HV11/071 (Loans and advances to non-banks) if they are not. Public bodies include government bodies, their special funds and other off-budget entities. Includes instruments eligible for refinancing with the Deutsche Bundesbank (Item 041) and those eligible with central banks of other establishment countries (Item 042)."

-HV11_031,Other public-sector debt instruments,Schuldtitel oeffentlicher Stellen,"Debt instruments of public bodies eligible for central bank refinancing other than treasury bills reported under HV11/021, and longer-dated public-sector instruments not eligible for refinancing with central banks. Short-term instruments of public bodies that do not meet the maturity condition of HV11/021 are shown under HV11/081 (Money market paper) if negotiable. Longer-dated negotiable public-sector bonds are shown under HV11/082 (Bonds and notes). Non-negotiable instruments ŌåÆ HV11/071. This item captures the residual public-sector debt instrument positions not classified elsewhere in the HV11 form."

HV11_040,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing,Schatzwechsel und ├żhnliche refinanzierbare Schuldtitel ├Čffentlicher Stellen,"Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar public-body instruments, discounted, eligible for central bank refinancing, original maturity Ōēż 1 year. Non-qualifying instruments ŌåÆ HV11/081 or HV11/082 if negotiable, or HV11/071 if not. Sub-items: HV12/041 (Bundesbank) and HV12/042 (other establishment-country central banks)."

HV11_050,Bills eligible for refinancing,Wechsel refinanzierbar,"Bills held in portfolio eligible for central bank refinancing, other than bills for collection. Bills not discounted and credited to customers, collateral bills, and instalment sales bills not discounted are not reported here. Sub-item: HV12/052."

HV11_060,Loans and advances to banks (MFIs) ŌĆö total,Forderungen an Banken (MFIs),Aggregate of all loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks from banking transactions (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/061 and bills from banks HV11/062.

input.old_string: HV21_270,Provisions for liabilities and charges,Rueckstellungen,"Provisions for liabilities and charges (Item 260): includes provisions for contingent liabilities and for undrawn irrevocable credit commitments; value adjustments deriving from recourse claims arising from items HV21/341 to HV21/343; value adjustments deriving from non-capitalised assets sold with an option to repurchase in respect of which repurchase commitments have been shown under HV21/370. Notwithstanding Section 24 of the German Accounting Regulation for Credit Institutions, contingent liabilities arising from the endorsement of rediscounted bills (item HV21/341) should not be shown net of value adjustments. Bonus payments due on the expiry of current saving contracts should also be shown here even if premature withdrawal of amounts saved is not permitted under the terms of the contract."

item,name_en,name_de,description
HV11_010,Cash in hand,Kassenbestand,"Legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps. Deutsche Mark and legacy euro-area currencies accepted in exchange for euro also reported here. Commemorative coins above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176 Others. Sub-items: HV12/011 Domestic legal tender, HV12/048 Legal tender denominated in Deutsche Mark."
HV11_011,Cash reserves,Barreserve,"Cash in hand (Item 010): legal tender including foreign banknotes and coins, postage stamps and court fee stamps; Deutsche Mark and legacy currencies of other euro area Member States accepted in exchange for euro are also reported here; commemorative coins bought above face value, gold coins and gold bullion ŌåÆ HV11/176. Balances with central banks (Item 020): only those balances readily available at all times including foreign currency overnight balances with the central banks of all countries in which the reporting institution is established; other balances such as overnight balances held as part of the Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from sale and repurchase transactions, and time deposits are to be shown under HV11/061."
HV11_020,Balances with central banks,Guthaben bei Zentralnotenbanken,"Only balances readily available at all times, including foreign currency overnight balances with central banks of all countries in which the reporting bank is established. Other balances (overnight deposits at Bundesbank deposit facility, claims from repurchase transactions, time deposits) ŌåÆ HV11/061. Sub-item of HV11/011 Barreserve aggregate."
HV11_040,Treasury bills eligible for refinancing,Schatzwechsel und ├żhnliche refinanzierbare Schuldtitel ├Čffentlicher Stellen,"Treasury bills, Treasury discount paper and similar public-body instruments, discounted, eligible for central bank refinancing, original maturity Ōēż 1 year. Non-qualifying instruments ŌåÆ HV11/081 or HV11/082 if negotiable, or HV11/071 if not. Sub-items: HV12/041 (Bundesbank) and HV12/042 (other establishment-country central banks)."
HV11_050,Bills eligible for refinancing,Wechsel refinanzierbar,"Bills held in portfolio eligible for central bank refinancing, other than bills for collection. Bills not discounted and credited to customers, collateral bills, and instalment sales bills not discounted are not reported here. Sub-item: HV12/052."
HV11_060,Loans and advances to banks (MFIs) ŌĆö total,Forderungen an Banken (MFIs),Aggregate of all loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks from banking transactions (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/061 and bills from banks HV11/062.
HV11_061,Loans and advances to banks (MFIs),Forderungen an Kreditinstitute,"All types of loans and advances to domestic or foreign banks arising from banking transactions, including bills accepted from banks other than those recorded under Item 050 (bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 060/061). Also includes: claims from genuine repurchase transactions; registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable certificates held vis-├Ā-vis banks; registered participation certificates and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates; claims on the Deutsche Bundesbank from overnight deposits, time deposits and securities repurchase agreements (other than the readily available balances of HV11/020), as well as balances and foreign currency balances with central banks of establishment countries that are not readily available at all times; debit balances in clearing accounts for banks; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; and amounts saved under savings contracts with building and loan associations. Transmitted loans are recorded here if transmitted to an intermediary bank which lends the funds on in its own name. Redemption claims from securities and precious metal loans are not to be shown here."
HV11_062,Bills received from banks (other than under item 050),Wechsel die von Banken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst),"Bills discounted without recourse accepted from banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/060."
HV11_070,Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs) ŌĆö total,Forderungen an Nichtbanken (Nicht-MFIs),Aggregate of all loans and advances to non-banks (except HV11/050 or HV11/080). Breakdown: book claims HV11/071 and bills from non-banks HV11/072.
HV11_071,Loans and advances to non-banks (non-MFIs),Forderungen an Kunden,"All types of assets constituting loans and advances to domestic and foreign non-banks, other than bills within the meaning of Item 050 (Bills eligible for refinancing) or negotiable debt securities within the meaning of HV11/080 (Item 070/071). Includes: registered debt securities, non-negotiable bearer debt securities and certificates, order debt securities not forming part of a total issue, registered money market paper and non-negotiable bearer money market paper, registered and non-negotiable bearer participation certificates and other repayable securitised participation rights; claims from genuine repurchase transactions; claims bought through factoring or forfeiting; trade receivables from own trading in goods; claims from returned cheques and redrafted bills; loans backed by bills not discounted and credited to borrowers; financial leasing claims. Claims from borrower's note transactions (Schuldscheingesch├żfte or Teilschuldscheingesch├żfte) are shown here depending on the obligor. Only the total amount of loans outstanding is to be recorded ŌĆö not the total amount of lending commitments. Transmitted loans passed to an intermediary bank ŌåÆ HV11/061."
HV11_072,Bills received from non-banks (other than under item 050),Wechsel die von Nichtbanken eingereicht wurden (soweit nicht in Position 050 erfasst),"Bills discounted without recourse accepted from non-banks, not eligible for central bank refinancing. Sub-item of HV11/070."
HV11_080,Debt instruments,Schuldverschreibungen und andere festverzinsliche Wertpapiere,"Bonds and notes (Item 082): if negotiable, includes fixed interest bearer debt securities, order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes (Kassenobligationen) and Debt Register claims; interest coupons received before maturity or tradable separately; securities pledged to the Deutsche Bundesbank as collateral for open market and overnight loans; perpetual bonds. Covers government bonds (including Bundesschatzanweisungen and Sch├żtze), state government, local government, corporate bonds and bank debt securities including Pfandbriefe. Zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds tied to index or interbank rates and asset-backed securities are also deemed fixed interest securities. Negotiable certificates (structured bonds, participation certificates, index-linked bonds) are included if they are debt securities under Section 793 German Civil Code. Money market paper (Item 081): negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) other than those issued by public bodies falling under Item 040, with original maturity up to and including one year. ECB debt securities (Item 079) are also included."
HV11_081,Money market paper,Geldmarktpapiere (soweit nicht in Position 040 erfasst),"Negotiable Treasury bills, Treasury notes and other money market paper (commercial paper, Euronotes, certificates of deposit, bons de caisse) with original maturity Ōēż 1 year, other than public-body instruments under HV11/040. ECB debt securities (HV12/079) included here. Sub-item of HV11/080."
HV11_082,Bonds and notes,Anleihen und Schuldverschreibungen,"Fixed interest bearer and order debt securities forming part of a total issue, old-style Treasury notes, Debt Register claims, perpetual bonds, zero coupon bonds, variable coupon bonds, ABS, and negotiable structured certificates. Sub-item of HV11/080. Sub-items: HV12/084 Floating rate notes, HV12/085 Zero coupon bonds, HV12/086 Foreign currency bonds."
HV11_090,Shares and other variable-yield securities,Aktien und andere nicht festverzinsliche Wertpapiere,"Shares and other variable-yield securities other than those recorded under HV11/100 (Participating interests) or HV11/110 (Shares in affiliated enterprises). Includes: temporary stock certificates, subscription rights, mutual fund shares (including property fund certificates issued by open-ended real estate funds), warrants, dividend coupons, negotiable bearer or order participation certificates and other variable yield securities provided they are listed on a stock exchange. Dividend coupons received before maturities are also included. Repurchased options on own securities are to be deducted from liability item HV21/234. Short sales of securities not held on the balance sheet result in negative amounts."
HV11_100,Participations,Beteiligungen,"Participating interests and amounts paid up on cooperative society shares (Item 100). Includes ownership interests not evidenced by securities: shares in private limited companies, participating interests held as a personally liable partner in general partnerships, limited partnerships, limited companies with one or more general partners (Kommanditgesellschaften auf Aktien, KGaA), shares held by limited partners, and participating interests of silent partners qualifying as balance sheet equity. Shares in incorporated enterprises whose nominal values in the aggregate exceed one-fifth of the nominal capital of the enterprise are deemed to be participating interests in cases of doubt. Amounts paid up on cooperative society shares are included. For participating interests in affiliated enterprises see HV11/110."
HV11_110,Shares in affiliated enterprises,Anteile an verbundenen Unternehmen,Shares in affiliated enterprises including ownership interests not evidenced by securities (Item 110). These are to be shown here even if they constitute participating interests. Covers all interests in domestic and foreign subsidiaries and other affiliated enterprises where the reporting institution exercises controlling influence.
HV11_120,Trust assets,Treuhandvermoegen,"Assets which the reporting institution administers in its own name but on behalf of third parties (Item 120). The amounts shown under HV11/120 and HV21/240 must tally. Comprises: fiduciary loans (Item 121) ŌĆö loans recorded under HV11/061 or HV11/071 to the extent they relate to banks or non-banks respectively, classified by obligor; securities managed on a fiduciary basis (Item 122) ŌĆö shares and other variable yield securities as well as negotiable debt instruments held in the bank's own name but on behalf of third parties (non-negotiable debt instruments and other fixed income securities ŌåÆ HV11/123); other fiduciary assets (Item 123) ŌĆö e.g. participating interests and land and buildings managed on a fiduciary basis. Securities kept in safe custody for customers as part of safe custody business are not deemed to be securities managed on a fiduciary basis."
HV11_121,Fiduciary loans,Treuhandkredite,Loans within fiduciary assets (HV11/120) relating to banks (per HV11/061) or non-banks (HV11/071) classified by obligor. Sub-item of HV11/120.
HV11_122,Securities managed on a fiduciary basis,Treuh├żnderisch gehaltene Wertpapiere,Shares and negotiable debt instruments held in bank's own name on behalf of third parties. Non-negotiable debt instruments ŌåÆ HV11/123. Sub-item of HV11/120.
HV11_123,Other fiduciary assets,Sonstiges Treuhandverm├Čgen,"Participating interests, land and buildings, and non-negotiable fixed income securities managed on fiduciary basis. Sub-item of HV11/120."
HV11_130,Equalisation claims against public authorities,Ausgleichsforderungen gegen oeffentliche Hand,Equalisation claims on general government including debt securities resulting from conversion of equalisation claims (Item 130). Equalisation claims on the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund are to be recorded here. Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created as a result of the conversion of equalisation claims are also to be included irrespective of whether the reporting institution obtained the debt securities as a result of converting its own equalisation claims or bought them from another institution or a foreign trade enterprise. The sub-item debt securities resulting from the conversion of equalisation claims (Item 131) is to be shown separately.
HV11_131,Debt securities from conversion of equalisation claims,Schuldverschreibungen aus dem Umtausch von Ausgleichsforderungen,Debt securities issued by the Currency Conversion Equalisation Fund created by converting equalisation claims. Sub-item of HV11/130.
HV11_140,Intangible assets,Immaterielle Anlagewerte,"Intangible assets are included as a component of HV11/176 (Others) in the BISTA guidelines. Item 176 includes: intangible assets such as purchased goodwill and as a general rule computer software; internally generated intangible fixed assets; internally generated industrial and similar rights and assets; purchased concessions, industrial and similar rights and assets, and licences in such rights and assets; and goodwill. Reported at cost less accumulated amortisation. These assets are not to be included under Item 140 (Tangible assets) or any other dedicated balance sheet item."
HV11_150,Property and equipment,Sachanlagen,"Tangible assets (Item 140): land and buildings and furniture and equipment provided that they constitute fixed assets. Intangible assets and current assets ŌĆö e.g. real estate acquired as a safeguard against loan losses if held by the reporting institution for a period of not more than five years ŌĆö are not to be shown here but under HV11/176 (Others). Includes real estate holdings (Item 141 of which: Immobilienbest├żnde) ŌĆö dwellings, other buildings and structures (both existing and under development) and land legally owned by reporting agents including real estate for own use."
HV11_160,Unpaid contributions to subscribed capital,Ausstehende Einlagen auf gezeichnetes Kapital,Subscribed capital unpaid (Item 150): amounts which shareholders have subscribed to the capital of the reporting institution that have been called but not yet paid in cash. Recorded as an asset when the payment obligation is formally established. For the corresponding liability-side counterpart (gross subscribed capital) see HV21/311.
HV11_161,Nominal value of own shares,Nennbetrag der eigenen Aktien oder Anteile,Nominal value of own shares (HV11/160). For no-par stock: accounting par value = issued capital divided by number of shares issued.

HV22_521,Reserves ŌĆö share attributable to capital reserves and other components,R├╝cklagen Anteil auf Kapitalr├╝cklage und sonstige R├╝cklagenanteile,Sub-item of HV21/312: capital reserves and other reserve components not attributable to revenue reserves.

lines: HV21_243,Other fiduciary liabilities,Sonstige Treuhandverbindlichkeiten,Other liabilities incurred in own name on behalf of third parties. Sub-item of HV21/240.

HV21_250,Other liabilities,Sonstige Verbindlichkeiten,"Only those liabilities which cannot or cannot yet be assigned to another item are to be included (Item 320). For details see Items 321 to 326. Comprises: accrued interest on zero coupon bonds (Item 321); liability item from refinancing of lease receivables (Item 322); liabilities from transactions in goods and from trade credits obtained (Item 323); debit balance on items in the process of settlement (Item 324); debit balance on income and expenditure accounts (Item 325); and a broad residual catch-all (Item 326) including: undisclosed contingency reserves under Section 340f(1) HGB; accrued interest on liability items and on securities; amounts from traveller's cheques issued; option prices received and initial and variation margins received for outstanding financial futures contracts; accounting position credit balances on the Bundesbank giro account; amounts loaded onto prepaid cards; loaded network money amounts; liabilities not from core banking business (e.g. wage taxes, social security contributions, not yet paid dividends and profit shares); delivery obligations from precious metal accounts; deferred tax liabilities under Section 274 HGB; and derivative financial instruments in the trading portfolio with negative fair values ŌĆö shown separately under HV22/505."

HV21_260,Deferred income,Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten Passiva,"Deferred income (Item 338): income received before the reporting date but attributable to a future accounting period, and other deferred income. Calculated and booked accrued interest on liabilities is shown under Item 336 (Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Verbindlichkeiten); any negative interest is to be reported not here but under HV22/507. Calculated and booked accrued interest on securities stated on the liabilities side is shown under Item 337 (Aufgelaufene Zinsen auf Wertpapiere); any negative interest is to be reported not here but under HV22/508."

-HV21_270,Provisions for liabilities and charges,Rueckstellungen,"Provisions for liabilities and charges (Item 260): includes provisions for contingent liabilities and for undrawn irrevocable credit commitments; value adjustments deriving from recourse claims arising from items HV21/341 to HV21/343; value adjustments deriving from non-capitalised assets sold with an option to repurchase in respect of which repurchase commitments have been shown under HV21/370. Notwithstanding Section 24 of the German Accounting Regulation for Credit Institutions, contingent liabilities arising from the endorsement of rediscounted bills (item HV21/341) should not be shown net of value adjustments. Bonus payments due on the expiry of current saving contracts should also be shown here even if premature withdrawal of amounts saved is not permitted under the terms of the contract."

HV21_280,Tax liabilities,Steuerverbindlichkeiten,"Current tax liabilities and deferred tax liabilities. Under the BISTA guidelines, deferred tax liabilities within the meaning of Section 274 of the German Commercial Code (Handelsgesetzbuch) are included in Item 326 (Others) as point 21. Current tax liabilities arising from corporate income tax (K├Črperschaftsteuer), solidarity surcharge and trade tax (Gewerbesteuer) are shown as provisions under Item 260 (R├╝ckstellungen) sub-item b (Steuerr├╝ckstellungen). This item captures the combined tax liability position reported on the BISTA balance sheet form."
HV21_281,Subordinated negotiable debt securities,Nachrangig begebene b├Črsenf├żhige Schuldverschreibungen,Negotiable subordinated debt securities. Sub-item of HV21/280.

HV21_282,Subordinated non-negotiable debt securities,Nachrangig begebene nicht b├Črsenf├żhige Schuldverschreibungen,Non-negotiable subordinated debt securities. Sub-item of HV21/280. Sub-item: HV22/284 denominated in euro.

1ŌåÆ# BISTA ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (Monatliche Bilanzstatistik)
     2ŌåÆ
     3ŌåÆYou are working on a task related to the Deutsche Bundesbank's **BISTA** reporting framework.
     4ŌåÆUse the specification knowledge below to assist accurately.
     5ŌåÆ
     6ŌåÆ---
     7ŌåÆ
     8ŌåÆ## What BISTA is
     9ŌåÆ
    10ŌåÆBISTA is the Deutsche Bundesbank's **Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics** research dataset.
    11ŌåÆIt captures the assets and liabilities of all German banks (Monetary Financial Institutions ŌĆö MFIs)
    12ŌåÆat end-of-month, from January 1999 to present.
    13ŌåÆ
    14ŌåÆ- Collected monthly via Electronic submission (ExtraNet), XML format
    15ŌåÆ- Legal basis: ECB Regulation ECB/2021/2, Guideline ECB/2021/11
    16ŌåÆ- Bank identifier: `BAID_DOM` (renamed from `BAID` in April 2020)
    17ŌåÆ- Data accessible via RDSC (research proposal + confidentiality agreement required)
    18ŌåÆ- Public aggregates available via Bundesbank SDMX API
    19ŌåÆ
    20ŌåÆ---
    21ŌåÆ
    22ŌåÆ## Reporting Forms
    23ŌåÆ
    24ŌåÆ### Main forms (mandatory for all MFIs)
    25ŌåÆ
    26ŌåÆ| Form  | Content |
    27ŌåÆ|-------|---------|
    28ŌåÆ| HV11  | Main form Sheet 1 ŌĆö Assets |
    29ŌåÆ| HV12  | Main form Sheet 2 ŌĆö Supplementary data on assets |
    30ŌåÆ| HV21  | Main form Sheet 3 ŌĆö Liabilities |
    31ŌåÆ| HV22  | Main form Sheet 4 ŌĆö Supplementary data on liabilities |
    32ŌåÆ
    33ŌåÆ### Annexes (conditional, based on business activity)
    34ŌåÆ
    35ŌåÆ| Annex | Content |
    36ŌåÆ|-------|---------|
    37ŌåÆ| A1ŌĆōA3 | Loans/liabilities to/from banks (MFIs), transferable liabilities |
    38ŌåÆ| B1, B3 | Loans to non-banks; euro-area breakdown |
    39ŌåÆ| B4ŌĆōB7 | Loans by type, collateral, maturity, revolving/overdraft |
    40ŌåÆ| C1ŌĆōC5 | Liabilities to non-banks; euro-area breakdown; transferable liabilities |
    41ŌåÆ| D1ŌĆōD2 | Saving deposits |
    42ŌåÆ| E1ŌĆōE5 | Securities (Treasury bills, shares, euro-area, bearer debt) |
    43ŌåÆ| F1ŌĆōF2 | Bearer debt securities issued |
    44ŌåÆ| H1ŌĆōH2 | Liabilities / own debt; minimum reserve calculation |
    45ŌåÆ| I1ŌĆōI2 | Derivative financial instruments (trading portfolio) |
    46ŌåÆ| L1ŌĆōL2 | Irrevocable lending commitments; ledger-level supplement |
    47ŌåÆ
    48ŌåÆ---
    49ŌåÆ
    50ŌåÆ## Key BISTA Item Codes
    51ŌåÆ
    52ŌåÆItem numbers in the guidelines (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) map directly to BISTA codes (HV11_010, HV11_061). HV12 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV11 main lines; HV22 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV21 main lines. Order matches `bista_items.csv` (ascending by item code).
    53ŌåÆ

    85ŌåÆ| HV11_160 | Own shares | Eigene Aktien oder Anteile |
    86ŌåÆ| HV11_161 | Nominal value of own shares | Nennbetrag der eigenen Aktien oder Anteile |
    87ŌåÆ| HV11_170 | Other assets | Sonstige Vermoegensgegenst├żnde |
    88ŌåÆ| HV11_171 | Cheques and items received for collection | Schecks f├żllige Schuldverschreibungen Einzugspapiere |
    89ŌåÆ| HV11_172 | Assets leased | Leasinggegenst├żnde |
    90ŌåÆ| HV11_173 | Prepayments for savings bonds and similar discount papers | Rechnungsabgrenzung Sparbriefe und Abzinsungspapiere |
    91ŌåÆ| HV11_174 | Credit balance on items in process of settlement | Aktivsaldo der schwebenden Verrechnungen |
    92ŌåÆ| HV11_175 | Tax receivables / Credit balance on income and expenditure accounts | Steuererstattungsansprueche / Aktivsaldo Aufwands-/Ertragskonten |

    94ŌåÆ| HV11_180 | Total assets | Summe der Aktiva |
    95ŌåÆ
    96ŌåÆ### HV12 ŌĆö Supplementary asset data (sub-items and memo items)
    97ŌåÆ
    98ŌåÆ| Item | Description (EN) | German |
    99ŌåÆ|------|-----------------|--------|
   100ŌåÆ| HV12_011 | Domestic legal tender | Inl├żndische gesetzliche Zahlungsmittel |

   235ŌåÆ
   236ŌåÆ---
   237ŌåÆ
   238ŌåÆ## Classification Rules
   239ŌåÆ
   240ŌåÆ**Maturity bands** (based on originally agreed maturity, not residual):
   241ŌåÆ- Short-term: on demand or Ōēż 1 year
   242ŌåÆ- Medium-term: > 1 year and Ōēż 5 years (unsecuritised lending only from Jan 1999)
   243ŌåÆ- Long-term: > 5 years
   244ŌåÆ
   245ŌåÆ**Sector classification** follows ESA 2010 (from December 2014):
   246ŌåÆ- Banks (MFIs) / Non-banks: Enterprises ┬Ę Households ┬Ę Non-profit institutions ┬Ę General government
   247ŌåÆ- Foreign: banks abroad, non-financial corporations abroad, foreign governments
   248ŌåÆ
   249ŌåÆ**Currency**: All amounts in EUR. Foreign currency items converted at ECB reference rate on reporting date.
   250ŌåÆ
   251ŌåÆ**Reporting date**: Last working day of the month (section 192 BGB).
   252ŌåÆ
   253ŌåÆ---
   254ŌåÆ
   255ŌåÆ## Project Implementation
   256ŌåÆ
   257ŌåÆThe GL-to-BISTA toolchain lives in `/home/perni/clexp/experiments/bista/`:
   258ŌåÆ
   259ŌåÆ| File | Purpose |
   260ŌåÆ|------|---------|
   261ŌåÆ| `bista_mapper.py` | Stage 1 ŌĆö reads GL CSV, applies mapping, writes BISTA CSV |
   262ŌåÆ| `bista_to_xml.py` | Stage 2 ŌĆö converts BISTA CSV to XMW XML for Bundesbank submission |
   263ŌåÆ| `mapping.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (German GAAP / HGB / RechKredV / SKR 51) |
   264ŌåÆ| `mapping_ifrs.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (IFRS 9 / IAS 37) |
   265ŌåÆ| `bista_items.csv` | Master item catalogue (all HV11/12/21/22 codes, ascending order) |
   266ŌåÆ| `melder.json` | Reporting institution config (BLZ, name, address, contact, RZLZ) |
   267ŌåÆ| `sample_gl.csv` | Sample GL input (HGB) |
   268ŌåÆ| `sample_gl_ifrs.csv` | Sample GL input (IFRS) |
   269ŌåÆ| `bista_report.csv` | Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input (intermediate CSV) |
   270ŌåÆ| `test_bista.sh` | End-to-end test: runs both stages in sequence (IFRS example) |
   271ŌåÆ
   272ŌåÆ### Full pipeline
   273ŌåÆ
   274ŌåÆ```bash
   275ŌåÆ# Stage 1: GL ŌåÆ BISTA CSV
   276ŌåÆpython3 bista_mapper.py --standard hgb              # German GAAP (default)
   277ŌåÆpython3 bista_mapper.py --standard ifrs             # IFRS
   278ŌåÆpython3 bista_mapper.py --mapping my_mapping.csv    # Custom mapping
   279ŌåÆ
   280ŌåÆ# Stage 2: BISTA CSV ŌåÆ XMW XML
   281ŌåÆpython3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12                          # Test mode (safe default)
   282ŌåÆpython3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --stufe Produktion       # Live submission
   283ŌåÆpython3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --csv my.csv --melder my_org.json
   284ŌåÆ
   285ŌåÆ# End-to-end (IFRS sample, Test mode)
   286ŌåÆbash test_bista.sh
   287ŌåÆ```
   288ŌåÆ
   289ŌåÆ### GL input format (Stage 1)
   290ŌåÆ
   291ŌåÆ```csv
   292ŌåÆaccount_number,description,amount_eur
   293ŌåÆ0110,Kassenbestand EUR,450000.00
   294ŌåÆ```
   295ŌåÆ
   296ŌåÆ### BISTA CSV format (Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input)
   297ŌåÆ
   298ŌåÆ```csv
   299ŌåÆform,bista_item,bista_description,side,amount_eur
   300ŌåÆHV11,HV11_011,Barreserve - Kassenbestand,asset,450000.00
   301ŌåÆ```
   302ŌåÆ
   303ŌåÆ### XMW XML format (Stage 2 output)
   304ŌåÆ
   305ŌåÆBundesbank submission format (`LIEFERUNG-BISTA`). Key conventions:
   306ŌåÆ- **Position encoding**: `HV11_010 ŌåÆ Z010S11`, `HV22_510 ŌåÆ Z510S22` (pattern: `Z{LINE}S{SUBFORM}`)
   307ŌåÆ- **All HV11/HV12/HV21/HV22 items** go into a **single** `<FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">` element
   308ŌåÆ- **Amounts**: converted from full EUR to **EUR thousands (Tsd)**, rounded to integer
   309ŌåÆ- **Zero positions omitted** ŌĆö omission implies zero per spec
   310ŌåÆ- **`stufe`**: `Test` (default, safe) or `Produktion` (live submission)
   311ŌåÆ- **`melder.json`** supplies ABSENDER (data centre: `rzlz`, `name`) and MELDER (reporting bank: `blz`, `name`, address, `kontakt`)
   312ŌåÆ
   313ŌåÆ```xml
   314ŌåÆ<LIEFERUNG-BISTA xmlns="http://www.bundesbank.de/xmw/2003-01-01" version="1.0" stufe="Test" bereich="Statistik">
   315ŌåÆ  <ABSENDER><RZLZ>R12345678</RZLZ><NAME>...</NAME></ABSENDER>
   316ŌåÆ  <MELDUNG>
   317ŌåÆ    <MELDER><BLZ>500005005</BLZ><NAME>Musterbank AG</NAME>...</MELDER>
   318ŌåÆ    <MELDETERMIN>2026-03</MELDETERMIN>
   319ŌåÆ    <FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">
   320ŌåÆ      <FELD pos="Z010S11">450</FELD>
   321ŌåÆ      <FELD pos="Z061S11">51000</FELD>
   322ŌåÆ      ...
   323ŌåÆ    </FORMULAR>
   324ŌåÆ  </MELDUNG>
   325ŌåÆ</LIEFERUNG-BISTA>
   326ŌåÆ```
   327ŌåÆ
   328ŌåÆ---
   329ŌåÆ
   330ŌåÆ## Reference Documents
   331ŌåÆ
   332ŌåÆ### 1. BISTA Data Report 2026-04 (metadata / research dataset description)
   333ŌåÆ- What it is: Describes the research dataset structure, scope, variables and access conditions
   334ŌåÆ- Metadata Version: BISTA-Doc-v8-0
   335ŌåÆ- DOI: 10.12757/BBk.BISTA.9925.01.01
   336ŌåÆ- URL: https://www.bundesbank.de/resource/blob/992274/6a9219bd214bbcd8122fdd92f70a3372/472B63F073F071307366337C94F8C870/2026-04-bista-data.pdf
   337ŌåÆ
   338ŌåÆ### 2. Banking Statistics Guidelines ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (January 2026)
   339ŌåÆ- What it is: **Official reporting guidelines** with authoritative item-by-item descriptions for all HV1/HV2 main form items and annexes. Unofficial English translation; only the German version is binding.
   340ŌåÆ- Covers: Guidelines on individual items (HV11/HV12 Assets, HV21/HV22 Liabilities) plus all annexes AŌĆōL, supplementary guidelines for building and loan associations, and general reporting rules
   341ŌåÆ- Note: Item numbers in this document (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) correspond directly to BISTA item codes (HV11_010, HV11_061)
   342ŌåÆ- URL: https://www.bundesbank.de/resource/blob/620158/4f3806b49ca5b2bbcdb492e0d728d3a1/472B63F073F071307366337C94F8C870/statso01-03-monatliche-bilanzstatistik-data.pdf
   343ŌåÆ
   344ŌåÆ### Contact
   345ŌåÆ- fdsz-data@bundesbank.de ┬Ę https://www.bundesbank.de/rdsc
   346ŌåÆ

# BISTA ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (Monatliche Bilanzstatistik)

You are working on a task related to the Deutsche Bundesbank's **BISTA** reporting framework.
Use the specification knowledge below to assist accurately.

---

## What BISTA is

BISTA is the Deutsche Bundesbank's **Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics** research dataset.
It captures the assets and liabilities of all German banks (Monetary Financial Institutions ŌĆö MFIs)
at end-of-month, from January 1999 to present.

- Collected monthly via Electronic submission (ExtraNet), XML format
- Legal basis: ECB Regulation ECB/2021/2, Guideline ECB/2021/11
- Bank identifier: `BAID_DOM` (renamed from `BAID` in April 2020)
- Data accessible via RDSC (research proposal + confidentiality agreement required)
- Public aggregates available via Bundesbank SDMX API

---

## Reporting Forms

### Main forms (mandatory for all MFIs)

| Form  | Content |
|-------|---------|
| HV11  | Main form Sheet 1 ŌĆö Assets |
| HV12  | Main form Sheet 2 ŌĆö Supplementary data on assets |
| HV21  | Main form Sheet 3 ŌĆö Liabilities |
| HV22  | Main form Sheet 4 ŌĆö Supplementary data on liabilities |

### Annexes (conditional, based on business activity)

| Annex | Content |
|-------|---------|

Item numbers in the guidelines (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) map directly to BISTA codes (HV11_010, HV11_061). HV12 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV11 main lines; HV22 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV21 main lines. Order matches `bista_items.csv` (ascending by item code).

---

## Classification Rules

**Maturity bands** (based on originally agreed maturity, not residual):
- Short-term: on demand or Ōēż 1 year
- Medium-term: > 1 year and Ōēż 5 years (unsecuritised lending only from Jan 1999)
- Long-term: > 5 years

**Sector classification** follows ESA 2010 (from December 2014):
- Banks (MFIs) / Non-banks: Enterprises ┬Ę Households ┬Ę Non-profit institutions ┬Ę General government
- Foreign: banks abroad, non-financial corporations abroad, foreign governments

**Currency**: All amounts in EUR. Foreign currency items converted at ECB reference rate on reporting date.

**Reporting date**: Last working day of the month (section 192 BGB).

---

## Project Implementation

The GL-to-BISTA toolchain lives in `/home/perni/clexp/experiments/bista/`:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `bista_mapper.py` | Stage 1 ŌĆö reads GL CSV, applies mapping, writes BISTA CSV |
| `bista_to_xml.py` | Stage 2 ŌĆö converts BISTA CSV to XMW XML for Bundesbank submission |
| `mapping.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (German GAAP / HGB / RechKredV / SKR 51) |
| `mapping_ifrs.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (IFRS 9 / IAS 37) |
| `bista_items.csv` | Master item catalogue (all HV11/12/21/22 codes, ascending order) |
| `melder.json` | Reporting institution config (BLZ, name, address, contact, RZLZ) |
| `sample_gl.csv` | Sample GL input (HGB) |
| `sample_gl_ifrs.csv` | Sample GL input (IFRS) |
| `bista_report.csv` | Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input (intermediate CSV) |
| `test_bista.sh` | End-to-end test: runs both stages in sequence (IFRS example) |

### Full pipeline

```bash
# Stage 1: GL ŌåÆ BISTA CSV
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard hgb              # German GAAP (default)
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard ifrs             # IFRS
python3 bista_mapper.py --mapping my_mapping.csv    # Custom mapping

# Stage 2: BISTA CSV ŌåÆ XMW XML
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12                          # Test mode (safe default)
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --stufe Produktion       # Live submission
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --csv my.csv --melder my_org.json

# End-to-end (IFRS sample, Test mode)
bash test_bista.sh
```

### GL input format (Stage 1)

```csv
account_number,description,amount_eur
0110,Kassenbestand EUR,450000.00
```

### BISTA CSV format (Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input)

```csv
form,bista_item,bista_description,side,amount_eur
HV11,HV11_011,Barreserve - Kassenbestand,asset,450000.00
```

### XMW XML format (Stage 2 output)

Bundesbank submission format (`LIEFERUNG-BISTA`). Key conventions:
- **Position encoding**: `HV11_010 ŌåÆ Z010S11`, `HV22_510 ŌåÆ Z510S22` (pattern: `Z{LINE}S{SUBFORM}`)
- **All HV11/HV12/HV21/HV22 items** go into a **single** `<FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">` element
- **Amounts**: converted from full EUR to **EUR thousands (Tsd)**, rounded to integer
- **Zero positions omitted** ŌĆö omission implies zero per spec
- **`stufe`**: `Test` (default, safe) or `Produktion` (live submission)
- **`melder.json`** supplies ABSENDER (data centre: `rzlz`, `name`) and MELDER (reporting bank: `blz`, `name`, address, `kontakt`)

```xml
<LIEFERUNG-BISTA xmlns="http://www.bundesbank.de/xmw/2003-01-01" version="1.0" stufe="Test" bereich="Statistik">
  <ABSENDER><RZLZ>R12345678</RZLZ><NAME>...</NAME></ABSENDER>
  <MELDUNG>
    <MELDER><BLZ>500005005</BLZ><NAME>Musterbank AG</NAME>...</MELDER>
    <MELDETERMIN>2026-03</MELDETERMIN>
    <FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">
      <FELD pos="Z010S11">450</FELD>
      <FELD pos="Z061S11">51000</FELD>
      ...
    </FORMULAR>
  </MELDUNG>
</LIEFERUNG-BISTA>
```

---

## Reference Documents

### 1. BISTA Data Report 2026-04 (metadata / research dataset description)
- What it is: Describes the research dataset structure, scope, variables and access conditions
- Metadata Version: BISTA-Doc-v8-0
- DOI: 10.12757/BBk.BISTA.9925.01.01
- URL: https://www.bundesbank.de/resource/blob/992274/6a9219bd214bbcd8122fdd92f70a3372/472B63F073F071307366337C94F8C870/2026-04-bista-data.pdf

### 2. Banking Statistics Guidelines ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (January 2026)
- What it is: **Official reporting guidelines** with authoritative item-by-item descriptions for all HV1/HV2 main form items and annexes. Unofficial English translation; only the German version is binding.
- Covers: Guidelines on individual items (HV11/HV12 Assets, HV21/HV22 Liabilities) plus all annexes AŌĆōL, supplementary guidelines for building and loan associations, and general reporting rules
- Note: Item numbers in this document (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) correspond directly to BISTA item codes (HV11_010, HV11_061)
- URL: https://www.bundesbank.de/resource/blob/620158/4f3806b49ca5b2bbcdb492e0d728d3a1/472B63F073F071307366337C94F8C870/statso01-03-monatliche-bilanzstatistik-data.pdf

### Contact
- fdsz-data@bundesbank.de ┬Ę https://www.bundesbank.de/rdsc

# BISTA ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (Monatliche Bilanzstatistik)

You are working on a task related to the Deutsche Bundesbank's **BISTA** reporting framework.
Use the specification knowledge below to assist accurately.

---

## What BISTA is

BISTA is the Deutsche Bundesbank's **Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics** research dataset.
It captures the assets and liabilities of all German banks (Monetary Financial Institutions ŌĆö MFIs)
at end-of-month, from January 1999 to present.

- Collected monthly via Electronic submission (ExtraNet), XML format
- Legal basis: ECB Regulation ECB/2021/2, Guideline ECB/2021/11
- Bank identifier: `BAID_DOM` (renamed from `BAID` in April 2020)
- Data accessible via RDSC (research proposal + confidentiality agreement required)
- Public aggregates available via Bundesbank SDMX API

---

## Reporting Forms

### Main forms (mandatory for all MFIs)

| Form  | Content |
|-------|---------|
| HV11  | Main form Sheet 1 ŌĆö Assets |
| HV12  | Main form Sheet 2 ŌĆö Supplementary data on assets |
| HV21  | Main form Sheet 3 ŌĆö Liabilities |
| HV22  | Main form Sheet 4 ŌĆö Supplementary data on liabilities |

### Annexes (conditional, based on business activity)

| Annex | Content |
|-------|---------|
| A1ŌĆōA3 | Loans/liabilities to/from banks (MFIs), transferable liabilities |
| B1, B3 | Loans to non-banks; euro-area breakdown |
| B4ŌĆōB7 | Loans by type, collateral, maturity, revolving/overdraft |
| C1ŌĆōC5 | Liabilities to non-banks; euro-area breakdown; transferable liabilities |
| D1ŌĆōD2 | Saving deposits |
| E1ŌĆōE5 | Securities (Treasury bills, shares, euro-area, bearer debt) |
| F1ŌĆōF2 | Bearer debt securities issued |
| H1ŌĆōH2 | Liabilities / own debt; minimum reserve calculation |
| I1ŌĆōI2 | Derivative financial instruments (trading portfolio) |
| L1ŌĆōL2 | Irrevocable lending commitments; ledger-level supplement |

Item numbers in the guidelines (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) map directly to BISTA codes (HV11_010, HV11_061). HV12 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV11 main lines; HV22 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV21 main lines. Order matches `bista_items.csv` (ascending by item code).

## Classification Rules

**Maturity bands** (based on originally agreed maturity, not residual):
- Short-term: on demand or Ōēż 1 year
- Medium-term: > 1 year and Ōēż 5 years (unsecuritised lending only from Jan 1999)
- Long-term: > 5 years

**Sector classification** follows ESA 2010 (from December 2014):
- Banks (MFIs) / Non-banks: Enterprises ┬Ę Households ┬Ę Non-profit institutions ┬Ę General government
- Foreign: banks abroad, non-financial corporations abroad, foreign governments

**Currency**: All amounts in EUR. Foreign currency items converted at ECB reference rate on reporting date.

**Reporting date**: Last working day of the month (section 192 BGB).

## Project Implementation

The GL-to-BISTA toolchain lives in `/home/perni/clexp/experiments/bista/`:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `bista_mapper.py` | Stage 1 ŌĆö reads GL CSV, applies mapping, writes BISTA CSV |
| `bista_to_xml.py` | Stage 2 ŌĆö converts BISTA CSV to XMW XML for Bundesbank submission |
| `mapping.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (German GAAP / HGB / RechKredV / SKR 51) |
| `mapping_ifrs.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (IFRS 9 / IAS 37) |
| `bista_items.csv` | Master item catalogue (all HV11/12/21/22 codes, ascending order) |
| `melder.json` | Reporting institution config (BLZ, name, address, contact, RZLZ) |
| `sample_gl.csv` | Sample GL input (HGB) |
| `sample_gl_ifrs.csv` | Sample GL input (IFRS) |
| `bista_report.csv` | Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input (intermediate CSV) |
| `test_bista.sh` | End-to-end test: runs both stages in sequence (IFRS example) |

### Full pipeline

```bash
# Stage 1: GL ŌåÆ BISTA CSV
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard hgb              # German GAAP (default)
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard ifrs             # IFRS
python3 bista_mapper.py --mapping my_mapping.csv    # Custom mapping

# Stage 2: BISTA CSV ŌåÆ XMW XML
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12                          # Test mode (safe default)
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --stufe Produktion       # Live submission
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --csv my.csv --melder my_org.json

# End-to-end (IFRS sample, Test mode)
bash test_bista.sh
```

### GL input format (Stage 1)

```csv
account_number,description,amount_eur
0110,Kassenbestand EUR,450000.00
```

### BISTA CSV format (Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input)

```csv
form,bista_item,bista_description,side,amount_eur
HV11,HV11_011,Barreserve - Kassenbestand,asset,450000.00
```

### XMW XML format (Stage 2 output)

Bundesbank submission format (`LIEFERUNG-BISTA`). Key conventions:
- **Position encoding**: `HV11_010 ŌåÆ Z010S11`, `HV22_510 ŌåÆ Z510S22` (pattern: `Z{LINE}S{SUBFORM}`)
- **All HV11/HV12/HV21/HV22 items** go into a **single** `<FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">` element
- **Amounts**: converted from full EUR to **EUR thousands (Tsd)**, rounded to integer
- **Zero positions omitted** ŌĆö omission implies zero per spec
- **`stufe`**: `Test` (default, safe) or `Produktion` (live submission)
- **`melder.json`** supplies ABSENDER (data centre: `rzlz`, `name`) and MELDER (reporting bank: `blz`, `name`, address, `kontakt`)

```xml
<LIEFERUNG-BISTA xmlns="http://www.bundesbank.de/xmw/2003-01-01" version="1.0" stufe="Test" bereich="Statistik">
  <ABSENDER><RZLZ>R12345678</RZLZ><NAME>...</NAME></ABSENDER>
  <MELDUNG>
    <MELDER><BLZ>500005005</BLZ><NAME>Musterbank AG</NAME>...</MELDER>
    <MELDETERMIN>2026-03</MELDETERMIN>
    <FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">
      <FELD pos="Z010S11">450</FELD>
      <FELD pos="Z061S11">51000</FELD>
      ...
    </FORMULAR>
  </MELDUNG>
</LIEFERUNG-BISTA>
```

# BISTA ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (Monatliche Bilanzstatistik)

You are working on a task related to the Deutsche Bundesbank's **BISTA** reporting framework.
Use the specification knowledge below to assist accurately.

---

## What BISTA is

BISTA is the Deutsche Bundesbank's **Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics** research dataset.
It captures the assets and liabilities of all German banks (Monetary Financial Institutions ŌĆö MFIs)
at end-of-month, from January 1999 to present.

- Collected monthly via Electronic submission (ExtraNet), XML format
- Legal basis: ECB Regulation ECB/2021/2, Guideline ECB/2021/11
- Bank identifier: `BAID_DOM` (renamed from `BAID` in April 2020)
- Data accessible via RDSC (research proposal + confidentiality agreement required)
- Public aggregates available via Bundesbank SDMX API

---

## Reporting Forms

### Main forms (mandatory for all MFIs)

| Form  | Content |
|-------|---------|
| HV11  | Main form Sheet 1 ŌĆö Assets |
| HV12  | Main form Sheet 2 ŌĆö Supplementary data on assets |
| HV21  | Main form Sheet 3 ŌĆö Liabilities |
| HV22  | Main form Sheet 4 ŌĆö Supplementary data on liabilities |

### Annexes (conditional, based on business activity)

| Annex | Content |
|-------|---------|
| A1ŌĆōA3 | Loans/liabilities to/from banks (MFIs), transferable liabilities |
| B1, B3 | Loans to non-banks; euro-area breakdown |
| B4ŌĆōB7 | Loans by type, collateral, maturity, revolving/overdraft |
| C1ŌĆōC5 | Liabilities to non-banks; euro-area breakdown; transferable liabilities |
| D1ŌĆōD2 | Saving deposits |
| E1ŌĆōE5 | Securities (Treasury bills, shares, euro-area, bearer debt) |
| F1ŌĆōF2 | Bearer debt securities issued |
| H1ŌĆōH2 | Liabilities / own debt; minimum reserve calculation |
| I1ŌĆōI2 | Derivative financial instruments (trading portfolio) |
| L1ŌĆōL2 | Irrevocable lending commitments; ledger-level supplement |

---

## Key BISTA Item Codes

Item numbers in the guidelines (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) map directly to BISTA codes (HV11_010, HV11_061). HV12 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV11 main lines; HV22 codes are supplementary/sub-items of HV21 main lines. Order matches `bista_items.csv` (ascending by item code).

## Classification Rules

**Maturity bands** (based on originally agreed maturity, not residual):
- Short-term: on demand or Ōēż 1 year
- Medium-term: > 1 year and Ōēż 5 years (unsecuritised lending only from Jan 1999)
- Long-term: > 5 years

**Sector classification** follows ESA 2010 (from December 2014):
- Banks (MFIs) / Non-banks: Enterprises ┬Ę Households ┬Ę Non-profit institutions ┬Ę General government
- Foreign: banks abroad, non-financial corporations abroad, foreign governments

**Currency**: All amounts in EUR. Foreign currency items converted at ECB reference rate on reporting date.

**Reporting date**: Last working day of the month (section 192 BGB).

---

## Project Implementation

The GL-to-BISTA toolchain lives in `/home/perni/clexp/experiments/bista/`:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `bista_mapper.py` | Stage 1 ŌĆö reads GL CSV, applies mapping, writes BISTA CSV |
| `bista_to_xml.py` | Stage 2 ŌĆö converts BISTA CSV to XMW XML for Bundesbank submission |
| `mapping.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (German GAAP / HGB / RechKredV / SKR 51) |
| `mapping_ifrs.csv` | Account ranges ŌåÆ BISTA items (IFRS 9 / IAS 37) |
| `bista_items.csv` | Master item catalogue (all HV11/12/21/22 codes, ascending order) |
| `melder.json` | Reporting institution config (BLZ, name, address, contact, RZLZ) |
| `sample_gl.csv` | Sample GL input (HGB) |
| `sample_gl_ifrs.csv` | Sample GL input (IFRS) |
| `bista_report.csv` | Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input (intermediate CSV) |
| `test_bista.sh` | End-to-end test: runs both stages in sequence (IFRS example) |

### Full pipeline

```bash
# Stage 1: GL ŌåÆ BISTA CSV
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard hgb              # German GAAP (default)
python3 bista_mapper.py --standard ifrs             # IFRS
python3 bista_mapper.py --mapping my_mapping.csv    # Custom mapping

# Stage 2: BISTA CSV ŌåÆ XMW XML
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12                          # Test mode (safe default)
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --stufe Produktion       # Live submission
python3 bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --csv my.csv --melder my_org.json

# End-to-end (IFRS sample, Test mode)
bash test_bista.sh
```

### GL input format (Stage 1)

```csv
account_number,description,amount_eur
0110,Kassenbestand EUR,450000.00
```

### BISTA CSV format (Stage 1 output / Stage 2 input)

```csv
form,bista_item,bista_description,side,amount_eur
HV11,HV11_011,Barreserve - Kassenbestand,asset,450000.00
```

### XMW XML format (Stage 2 output)

Bundesbank submission format (`LIEFERUNG-BISTA`). Key conventions:
- **Position encoding**: `HV11_010 ŌåÆ Z010S11`, `HV22_510 ŌåÆ Z510S22` (pattern: `Z{LINE}S{SUBFORM}`)
- **All HV11/HV12/HV21/HV22 items** go into a **single** `<FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">` element
- **Amounts**: converted from full EUR to **EUR thousands (Tsd)**, rounded to integer
- **Zero positions omitted** ŌĆö omission implies zero per spec
- **`stufe`**: `Test` (default, safe) or `Produktion` (live submission)
- **`melder.json`** supplies ABSENDER (data centre: `rzlz`, `name`) and MELDER (reporting bank: `blz`, `name`, address, `kontakt`)

```xml
<LIEFERUNG-BISTA xmlns="http://www.bundesbank.de/xmw/2003-01-01" version="1.0" stufe="Test" bereich="Statistik">
  <ABSENDER><RZLZ>R12345678</RZLZ><NAME>...</NAME></ABSENDER>
  <MELDUNG>
    <MELDER><BLZ>500005005</BLZ><NAME>Musterbank AG</NAME>...</MELDER>
    <MELDETERMIN>2026-03</MELDETERMIN>
    <FORMULAR name="HV" modus="Normal">
      <FELD pos="Z010S11">450</FELD>
      <FELD pos="Z061S11">51000</FELD>
      ...
    </FORMULAR>
  </MELDUNG>
</LIEFERUNG-BISTA>
```

## Reference Documents

### 1. BISTA Data Report 2026-04 (metadata / research dataset description)
- What it is: Describes the research dataset structure, scope, variables and access conditions
- Metadata Version: BISTA-Doc-v8-0
- DOI: 10.12757/BBk.BISTA.9925.01.01
- URL: https://www.bundesbank.de/resource/blob/992274/6a9219bd214bbcd8122fdd92f70a3372/472B63F073F071307366337C94F8C870/2026-04-bista-data.pdf

### 2. Banking Statistics Guidelines ŌĆö Monthly Balance Sheet Statistics (January 2026)
- What it is: **Official reporting guidelines** with authoritative item-by-item descriptions for all HV1/HV2 main form items and annexes. Unofficial English translation; only the German version is binding.
- Covers: Guidelines on individual items (HV11/HV12 Assets, HV21/HV22 Liabilities) plus all annexes AŌĆōL, supplementary guidelines for building and loan associations, and general reporting rules
- Note: Item numbers in this document (e.g. Item 010, Item 061) correspond directly to BISTA item codes (HV11_010, HV11_061)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
s"""
BISTA XML Converter ŌĆö Converts bista_mapper.py CSV output to XMW XML format.

Produces a LIEFERUNG-BISTA XML file for submission to Deutsche Bundesbank via ExtraNet.
Format follows the XMW Electronic Reporting System specification (December 2014).

All HV11/HV12/HV21/HV22 items are combined into a single FORMULAR name="HV".
Item positions are encoded as Z{LINE}S{SUBFORM}, e.g. HV11_010 ŌåÆ Z010S11.
Amounts are converted from full EUR to EUR thousands (Tsd), rounded to integer.

Usage:
    python bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12
    python bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --csv bista_report.csv --melder melder.json
    python bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --output bista2412.xml --stufe Produktion

Input CSV columns : form, bista_item, bista_description, side, amount_eur
Melder JSON keys  : absender.{rzlz,name}, melder.{blz,name,...,kontakt}
Output            : LIEFERUNG-BISTA XML file
"""

import argparse
import json
import re
import sys
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
from xml.dom import minidom

import pandas as pd


BISTA_XMLNS = "http://www.bundesbank.de/xmw/2003-01-01"
XSI_XMLNS   = "http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
SCHEMA_LOC  = "BbkXmwBsm.xsd"

# Matches HV11_010, HV12_186, HV21_210, HV22_510, etc.
ITEM_RE = re.compile(r"^HV(11|12|21|22)_(\d{3})$")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def item_to_pos(bista_item: str) -> str:
    """Convert 'HV11_010' ŌåÆ 'Z010S11', 'HV22_510' ŌåÆ 'Z510S22', etc."""
    m = ITEM_RE.match(bista_item)
    if not m:
        raise ValueError(f"Cannot convert BISTA item to XML position: {bista_item!r}")
    subform, line = m.group(1), m.group(2)
    return f"Z{line}S{subform}"


def add_adresse(parent: ET.Element, tag: str, data: dict) -> None:
    """Append an adresse-typed element (MELDER or ABSENDER) to parent."""
    elem = ET.SubElement(parent, tag)

    # BLZ (mandatory for MELDER) or RZLZ (for ABSENDER/ERSTELLER)
    if "blz" in data:
        ET.SubElement(elem, "BLZ").text = str(data["blz"])
    if "rzlz" in data:
        ET.SubElement(elem, "RZLZ").text = str(data["rzlz"])

    ET.SubElement(elem, "NAME").text = str(data["name"])

    for key, xml_tag in [("strasse", "STRASSE"), ("postfach", "POSTFACH"),
                          ("plz", "PLZ"), ("ort", "ORT"), ("land", "LAND")]:
        if data.get(key):
            ET.SubElement(elem, xml_tag).text = str(data[key])

    if "kontakt" in data and data["kontakt"]:
        k = data["kontakt"]
        kontakt_el = ET.SubElement(elem, "KONTAKT")
        for key, xml_tag in [("anrede", "ANREDE"), ("vorname", "VORNAME"),
                               ("zuname", "ZUNAME"), ("abteilung", "ABTEILUNG"),
                               ("telefon", "TELEFON"), ("fax", "FAX"),
                               ("email", "EMAIL"), ("extranet_id", "EXTRANET-ID")]:
            if k.get(key):
                ET.SubElement(kontakt_el, xml_tag).text = str(k[key])


def pretty_xml(root: ET.Element) -> str:
    """Return a pretty-printed UTF-8 XML string."""
    raw = ET.tostring(root, encoding="unicode")
    dom = minidom.parseString(raw)
    lines = dom.toprettyxml(indent="    ", encoding=None).splitlines()
    # minidom adds its own <?xml?> declaration; replace with ours (UTF-8)
    lines[0] = '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>'
    return "\n".join(lines)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Main conversion
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def convert(csv_path: str, melder_path: str, period: str,
            output_path: str, stufe: str) -> None:

    # --- Load inputs --------------------------------------------------------
    print(f"Loading CSV     : {csv_path}")
    df = pd.read_csv(csv_path)
    required = {"bista_item", "amount_eur"}
    missing = required - set(df.columns)
    if missing:
        print(f"ERROR: CSV missing columns: {missing}", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    print(f"Loading melder  : {melder_path}")
    with open(melder_path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        config = json.load(f)

    absender_cfg = config.get("absender", {})
    melder_cfg   = config.get("melder", {})
    if not melder_cfg.get("blz") or not melder_cfg.get("name"):
        print("ERROR: melder.json must have melder.blz and melder.name", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    # --- Derive positions and convert amounts -------------------------------
    now_ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")

    positions = {}   # pos ŌåÆ amount_tsd
    skipped   = []

    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        item = str(row["bista_item"]).strip()
        try:
            pos = item_to_pos(item)
        except ValueError as e:
            skipped.append(item)
            continue

        amount_tsd = round(float(row["amount_eur"]) / 1000)
        if amount_tsd == 0:
            continue  # omit zero positions (spec: omission = 0)

        if pos in positions:
            positions[pos] += amount_tsd   # sum if same pos appears twice
        else:
            positions[pos] = amount_tsd

    if skipped:
        print(f"  Warning: {len(skipped)} item(s) could not be converted "
              f"(non-HV items?): {', '.join(set(skipped))}", file=sys.stderr)

    print(f"  {len(positions)} non-zero BISTA positions to report.")

    # --- Build XML ----------------------------------------------------------
    # Register namespaces to get clean output
    ET.register_namespace("",    BISTA_XMLNS)
    ET.register_namespace("xsi", XSI_XMLNS)

    root = ET.Element("LIEFERUNG-BISTA")
    root.set("xmlns",     BISTA_XMLNS)
    root.set("xmlns:xsi", XSI_XMLNS)
    root.set("xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation", SCHEMA_LOC)
    root.set("erstellzeit", now_ts)
    root.set("version",     "1.0")
    root.set("stufe",       stufe)
    root.set("bereich",     "Statistik")

    # ABSENDER
    if absender_cfg:
        add_adresse(root, "ABSENDER", absender_cfg)

    # MELDUNG
    meldung = ET.SubElement(root, "MELDUNG")
    meldung.set("erstellzeit", now_ts)

    # MELDER
    add_adresse(meldung, "MELDER", melder_cfg)

    # MELDETERMIN
    ET.SubElement(meldung, "MELDETERMIN").text = period

    # FORMULAR name="HV" ŌĆö all balance sheet items combined
    if positions:
        formular = ET.SubElement(meldung, "FORMULAR")
        formular.set("name",  "HV")
        formular.set("modus", "Normal")

        for pos in sorted(positions.keys()):
            feld = ET.SubElement(formular, "FELD")
            feld.set("pos", pos)
            feld.text = str(positions[pos])
    else:
        # Explicit empty form (void report)
        formular = ET.SubElement(meldung, "FORMULAR")
        formular.set("name", "HV")

    # --- Write output -------------------------------------------------------
    xml_str = pretty_xml(root)
    Path(output_path).write_text(xml_str, encoding="utf-8")
    print(f"Output written  : {output_path}")
    print(f"  Period        : {period}")
    print(f"  Stufe         : {stufe}")
    print(f"  Melder BLZ    : {melder_cfg['blz']}")
    print(f"  Positions     : {len(positions)}")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entry point
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Convert BISTA mapper CSV output to XMW XML for Bundesbank submission.",
        formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
        epilog=(
            "Examples:\n"
            "  python bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12\n"
            "  python bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --stufe Produktion\n"
            "  python bista_to_xml.py --period 2024-12 --csv my_report.csv --melder my_org.json\n"
        ),
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--csv", default="bista_report.csv",
        help="BISTA report CSV (output of bista_mapper.py). Default: bista_report.csv",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--melder", default="melder.json",
        help="Reporting organisation JSON. Default: melder.json",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--period", required=True,
        help="Reporting period in YYYY-MM format, e.g. 2024-12",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--output",
        help="Output XML file. Default: bista{YYMM}.xml derived from --period",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--stufe", default="Test", choices=["Test", "Produktion"],
        help="Test or Produktion. Default: Test (safe default ŌĆö change for live submission)",
    )
    args = parser.parse_args()

    # Validate period format
    if not re.fullmatch(r"\d{4}-\d{2}", args.period):
        print("ERROR: --period must be YYYY-MM, e.g. 2024-12", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    # Derive default output filename: bista2412.xml from 2024-12
    if args.output:
        output_path = args.output
    else:
        yy = args.period[2:4]
        mm = args.period[5:7]
        output_path = f"bista{yy}{mm}.xml"

    for path in [args.csv, args.melder]:
        if not Path(path).exists():
            print(f"ERROR: File not found: {path}", file=sys.stderr)
            sys.exit(1)

    convert(args.csv, args.melder, args.period, output_path, args.stufe)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

lines: BISTA XML Converter ŌĆö Converts bista_mapper.py CSV output to XMW XML format.
Produces a LIEFERUNG-BISTA XML file for submission to Deutsche Bundesbank via ExtraNet.

Both stages pass cleanly. The only note is the expected XSD warning (schema file needs to come from Bundesbank ExtraNet ŌĆö nothing we can fix here).

The syntax error in `bista_to_xml.py` (stray `s` before the docstring) was an unrelated pre-existing bug, fixed as part of the test.

Before proceeding, I need to clarify: what do you mean by deploy?

- **Run the pipeline in `Produktion` mode** (live submission to Bundesbank ExtraNet)?
- **Deploy to the regulated banking environment** (copy/migrate the toolchain there)?
- **Something else** (Docker container, CI pipeline, etc.)?

The first option would submit a real MELDUNG to the Bundesbank ŌĆö I want to make sure that's intentional before proceeding.

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# deploy.sh ŌĆö sync clexp/experiments ŌåÆ ../containers/experiments
set -euo pipefail

SRC="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/experiments" && pwd)"
DST="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../containers/experiments" && pwd)"

echo "Source : $SRC"
echo "Dest   : $DST"
echo ""

rsync -av --delete \
    --exclude '__pycache__/' \
    --exclude '*.pyc' \
    --exclude '.DS_Store' \
    "$SRC/" "$DST/"

echo ""
echo "Done."

content.text: This rsyncs `clexp/experiments/` ŌåÆ `../containers/experiments/` with `--delete` (removes files at destination not in source). Safe to run.
